understanding.role_in_article: Sets the overarching thesis: the AI industry is shifting towards RL and post-training, which demands massive amounts of highly curated data and complex computer use environments.
understanding.relation_to_previous: N/A (Opening section).
understanding.relation_to_next: Mentions that labs find building these environments internally too slow and resort to outsourcing, perfectly setting up the historical context of Scale AI in the next section.
key_points: The paradigm shift from pre-training data aggregation to RL scaling and post-training.
High-signal user data curation allows smaller companies to compete with major labs.
Building computer use environments requires rote software engineering, driving the need for outsourcing.

paragraphs.source: Last June, we argued that scaling RL is the critical path to unlocking further AI capabilities. As we will show, the past several months have affirmed our thesis: major capability gains are coming from ramping RL compute. Pre-training continues to see further optimizations, but the lab’s are laser focused on scaling compute for RL.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Last June, we argued that scaling RL is the critical path to unlocking further AI capabilities. As we will show, the past several months have affirmed our thesis: major capability gains are coming from ramping RL compute. Pre-training continues to see further optimizations, but the lab’s are laser focused on scaling compute for RL.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Last June, we argued that scaling RL is the critical path to unlocking further AI capabilities. As we will show, the past several months have affirmed our thesis: major capability gains are coming from ramping RL compute. Pre-training continues to see further optimizations, but the lab’s are laser focused on scaling compute for RL.

pro.text: 去年六月，我们曾断言：扩展 RL (强化学习) 是解锁更强 AI 能力的关键路径。正如后文所示，过去数月的发展印证了我们的预判——核心能力的大幅跃升正源于 RL 算力的持续加码。尽管预训练仍在不断优化，但各大实验室已将焦点死死锁定在扩展 RL 算力上。

paragraphs.source: The best example of this is demonstrated by OpenAI. The company has used the same base model, GPT-4o, for all their recent flagship models: o1, o3, and GPT-5 series. Gains in the performance of OpenAI’s models for 18 months were being driven by post-training and scaling up RL compute alone. OpenAI has now fixed their pretraining problems, so with that vector of scaling unlocked, progress will be even more rapid.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The best example of this is demonstrated by OpenAI. The company has used the same base model, GPT-4o, for all their recent flagship models: o1, o3, and GPT-5 series. Gains in the performance of OpenAI’s models for 18 months were being driven by post-training and scaling up RL compute alone. OpenAI has now fixed their pretraining problems, so with that vector of scaling unlocked, progress will be even more rapid.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The best example of this is demonstrated by OpenAI. The company has used the same base model, GPT-4o, for all their recent flagship models: o1, o3, and GPT-5 series. Gains in the performance of OpenAI’s models for 18 months were being driven by post-training and scaling up RL compute alone. OpenAI has now fixed their pretraining problems, so with that vector of scaling unlocked, progress will be even more rapid.

pro.text: OpenAI 就是绝佳的例证。该公司近期发布的所有旗舰模型（o1、o3 及 GPT-5 系列），均沿用了同一个基础模型——GPT-4o。过去 18 个月里，OpenAI 模型的性能提升，完全归功于后训练与 RL 算力的扩展。如今，OpenAI 已解决其预训练难题；随着这一扩展维度的打通，未来的技术演进必将更加迅猛。

paragraphs.source: This is not to say that pre-training is dead: Anthropic, xAI, and especially Google all derived significant gains from scaling up pre-training. But OpenAI’s progress last year and ability to keep up using an older base model was existence proof of the efficacy of post-training.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: This is not to say that pre-training is dead: Anthropic, xAI, and especially Google all derived significant gains from scaling up pre-training. But OpenAI’s progress last year and ability to keep up using an older base model was existence proof of the efficacy of post-training.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: This is not to say that pre-training is dead: Anthropic, xAI, and especially Google all derived significant gains from scaling up pre-training. But OpenAI’s progress last year and ability to keep up using an older base model was existence proof of the efficacy of post-training.

pro.text: 这并非断言预训练已死：Anthropic、xAI，尤其是 Google，均从扩展预训练中获益匪浅。但 OpenAI 去年的进展，及其仅凭旧版基础模型便能稳居第一梯队的能力，正是后训练有效性的有力证明。

paragraphs.source: Scaling up RL is difficult as it requires a steady stream of tasks the model needs to solve and learn from. Pre-training had the entire internet to train on, but equivalent corpus for RL is yet to be fully created. Most RL data and tasks must be constructed from scratch, which can be quite labor intensive.

paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Scaling up RL is difficult as it requires a steady stream of tasks the model needs to solve and learn from. Pre-training had the entire internet to train on, but equivalent corpus for RL is yet to be fully created. Most RL data and tasks must be constructed from scratch, which can be quite labor intensive.

pro.text: 扩展 RL 绝非易事，这要求源源不断的任务供模型去解决并从中学习。预训练能以整个互联网为训练场，但 RL 尚无同等规模的语料库。绝大多数 RL 数据与任务必须从零构建，极耗人力。

paragraphs.source: Making the models “do the homework” started with math problems, which are easy to grade. Methods have since advanced, including branching out to newer domains like healthcare and financial modelling. To do this, models are placed in increasingly specialized “environments” that require the model to do these tasks.

To do this, models are placed in increasingly specialized “environments” that require the model to do these tasks.

pro.text: 让模型“做作业”始于数学题，这类问题极易评分。此后训练方法不断演进，触角已延伸至医疗健康与金融建模等全新领域。为此，模型被置于专业化程度日益加深的“环境”中，被迫在其中完成各项任务。

paragraphs.source: Aggregating tasks and data can be done manually, or through the curation of high signal user data. The latter is what gives companies like Windsurf and Cursor the ability to post-train their own competitive models despite not having the resources of a lab.

pro.text: 汇总任务与数据既可依靠人工，也可通过提炼高信号用户数据来实现。正是得益于后者，Windsurf 与 Cursor 等公司纵使缺乏顶尖实验室的资源，依然能后训练出极具竞争力的自有模型。

paragraphs.source: These post-training efforts have improved model capability in domains like coding, but also model utility: models are more usable in everyday tools like Excel and PowerPoint.

paragraphs.source: To measure how much models are improving in utility and capability, OpenAI created an eval called GDPval. This eval covers 1000+ tasks across 44 occupations, picked from sectors that representing >5% of the economy. Many of these tasks are digital but require several hours to complete for a human. These tasks were created in conjunction with experts, averaging 14 years of experience.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: To measure how much models are improving in utility and capability, OpenAI created an eval called GDPval. This eval covers 1000+ tasks across 44 occupations, picked from sectors that representing >5% of the economy. Many of these tasks are digital but require several hours to complete for a human. These tasks were created in conjunction with experts, averaging 14 years of experience.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: To measure how much models are improving in utility and capability, OpenAI created an eval called GDPval. This eval covers 1000+ tasks across 44 occupations, picked from sectors that representing >5% of the economy. Many of these tasks are digital but require several hours to complete for a human. These tasks were created in conjunction with experts, averaging 14 years of experience.

pro.text: 为衡量模型在实用性与能力上的进步幅度，OpenAI 创立了名为 GDPval 的评估基准。该基准涵盖 44 个职业的 1000 多项任务，均精选自占经济比重超 5% 的行业。其中许多属于数字化任务，但人类仍需耗费数小时方可完成。这些任务由 OpenAI 携手平均从业经验达 14 年的专家共同设计。

paragraphs.source: Models are asked to solve these problems, given a prompt and a set of supporting documents. Tasks include filing a tax return for a fictitious human, creating slides as a client advisor for a resort, and creating commercials from a given set of stock footage. Grading occurs through experts picking between a model’s answer and a human expert’s answer. This win rate, if equal, would then mean that a model’s performance is then in parity with a human expert. The best current model, GPT-5.2, scores around 71%, meaning its work is tied to or preferred from human outputs 71% of the time.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Models are asked to solve these problems, given a prompt and a set of supporting documents. Tasks include filing a tax return for a fictitious human, creating slides as a client advisor for a resort, and creating commercials from a given set of stock footage. Grading occurs through experts picking between a model’s answer and a human expert’s answer. This win rate, if equal, would then mean that a model’s performance is then in parity with a human expert. The best current model, GPT-5.2, scores around 71%, meaning its work is tied to or preferred from human outputs 71% of the time.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Models are asked to solve these problems, given a prompt and a set of supporting documents. Tasks include filing a tax return for a fictitious human, creating slides as a client advisor for a resort, and creating commercials from a given set of stock footage. Grading occurs through experts picking between a model’s answer and a human expert’s answer. This win rate, if equal, would then mean that a model’s performance is then in parity with a human expert. The best current model, GPT-5.2, scores around 71%, meaning its work is tied to or preferred from human outputs 71% of the time.

pro.text: 在提供提示词与一组参考文档的前提下，模型需着手解决这些问题。具体任务包括为虚构人物报税、以度假村客户顾问身份制作幻灯片，以及利用指定库存素材剪辑商业广告。评分方式是让专家在模型答案与人类专家答案之间做选择。若胜率持平，即意味着模型性能已与人类专家并驾齐驱。目前最强的 GPT-5.2 模型得分约为 71%，这意味着在 71% 的情况下，其产出与人类打平或更受青睐。

paragraphs.source: While GDPval has some issues (e.g., skewed toward unusually specific digital work) it is the best example of how evaluations are shifting from measuring abstract intelligence to real world utility. This stands in contrast to most of the previous model evaluations, which focused on things like mathematical knowledge or PhD level scientific questions graded via multiple choice.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: While GDPval has some issues (e.g., skewed toward unusually specific digital work) it is the best example of how evaluations are shifting from measuring abstract intelligence to real world utility. This stands in contrast to most of the previous model evaluations, which focused on things like mathematical knowledge or PhD level scientific questions graded via multiple choice.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: While GDPval has some issues (e.g., skewed toward unusually specific digital work) it is the best example of how evaluations are shifting from measuring abstract intelligence to real world utility. This stands in contrast to most of the previous model evaluations, which focused on things like mathematical knowledge or PhD level scientific questions graded via multiple choice.

pro.text: 尽管 GDPval 存在些许瑕疵（如过度偏重极其具体的数字化工作），但它仍是绝佳范例，印证了评估标准正从衡量抽象智力转向真实世界实用性。这与以往多数模型评估形成鲜明对比。此前的评估往往聚焦数学知识，或以选择题形式考查博士级科学问题。

中英文之间缺少必要的空格（“自主AI研究员”）。
将“require”译为“被迫”，语气略显夸张（Semantic inflation）。

paragraphs.source: The underlying trend is models being able to operate autonomously for longer. With improved capabilities over shorter and longer horizons, AI companies think that models can help invent the next version of themselves. OpenAI, for their part, target having autonomous AI researchers by a March of 2028. Anthropic projects that in 2027, systems like Claude will be able to autonomously find breakthroughs that would otherwise take years to achieve.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The underlying trend is models being able to operate autonomously for longer. With improved capabilities over shorter and longer horizons, AI companies think that models can help invent the next version of themselves. OpenAI, for their part, target having autonomous AI researchers by a March of 2028. Anthropic projects that in 2027, systems like Claude will be able to autonomously find breakthroughs that would otherwise take years to achieve.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The underlying trend is models being able to operate autonomously for longer. With improved capabilities over shorter and longer horizons, AI companies think that models can help invent the next version of themselves. OpenAI, for their part, target having autonomous AI researchers by a March of 2028. Anthropic projects that in 2027, systems like Claude will be able to autonomously find breakthroughs that would otherwise take years to achieve.

pro.text: 这一转变背后的底层趋势是，模型自主运行的时长正不断增加。随着模型在长短周期任务中的能力双双提升，AI 公司笃定，模型必将能协助研发下一代模型。就 OpenAI 而言，其目标是在 2028 年 3 月前打造出自主AI研究员。Anthropic 则预测，到 2027 年，Claude 等系统将能自主攻克原本耗时数载方可达成的技术突破。

paragraphs.source: But this journey will require significant amounts of data and task curation. Computer use environments for example require considerable amount of rote software engineering including replicating existing websites on the internet. This can be slow for the labs to do which is why much of it has been outsourced.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: But this journey will require significant amounts of data and task curation. Computer use environments for example require considerable amount of rote software engineering including replicating existing websites on the internet. This can be slow for the labs to do which is why much of it has been outsourced.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: But this journey will require significant amounts of data and task curation. Computer use environments for example require considerable amount of rote software engineering including replicating existing websites on the internet. This can be slow for the labs to do which is why much of it has been outsourced.

pro.text: 然而，实现这一愿景需要海量的数据与精细的任务提炼。以计算机操作环境为例，其构建过程充斥着大量机械性的软件工程工作，例如复刻互联网上的现有网站。顶尖实验室自行处理这些工作耗时费力，因此大部分此类工作已被外包。

sections.title: Outsourcing and The Ghost of Scale AI
sections.title_translation: 外包与 Scale AI 的幽灵

paragraphs.source: Historically, Scale AI was one of the largest data contractors for the labs but now has been mostly absorbed by Meta. Scale saw considerable spending from across all labs, with revenues north of $1.4B in 2024.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Historically, Scale AI was one of the largest data contractors for the labs but now has been mostly absorbed by Meta. Scale saw considerable spending from across all labs, with revenues north of $1.4B in 2024.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Historically, Scale AI was one of the largest data contractors for the labs but now has been mostly absorbed by Meta. Scale saw considerable spending from across all labs, with revenues north of $1.4B in 2024.

pro.text: 过去，Scale AI 曾是各大实验室最大的数据承包商之一，但如今已基本被 Meta 收入麾下。各大实验室曾在 Scale 身上砸下重金，助其 2024 年营收突破 14 亿美元。

applied_terms: Translate 'The Ghost of Scale AI' non-literally to capture its lingering influence or the vacuum it left behind (e.g., Scale AI 的幽灵/余波).
Use industry-standard terms for 'evaluations' (模型评测) and 'data contractors' (数据承包商).

understanding.role_in_article: Provides historical market context and identifies the catalyst for the current industry landscape: the vacuum left by Scale AI.
understanding.relation_to_previous: Answers why outsourcing is a focal point by examining the historical dominator of the AI data contracting market.
understanding.relation_to_next: Ends with a direct question about who is filling the gap left by Scale AI, teeing up the introduction of new startups selling 'shovels'.
key_points: Scale AI historically dominated lab data contracting with massive revenues.
Meta's acquisition of Scale AI caused other labs to pull back to protect their proprietary data demands.
A massive market gap emerged for high-quality RL data providers.
translation_notes: Translate 'The Ghost of Scale AI' non-literally to capture its lingering influence or the vacuum it left behind (e.g., Scale AI 的幽灵/余波).
Use industry-standard terms for 'evaluations' (模型评测) and 'data contractors' (数据承包商).

issues.description: 中英文之间缺失空格（Meta超级智能团队）；此外，根据翻译注意点要求，行业术语 'evaluations' 应译为“评测”而非“评估”。
同样存在中英文字符未加空格的问题（Meta超级智能团队）。另外，原文的 'Leadership Compute, Talent, and Data' 虽未加逗号，但在 SemiAnalysis 的标题体例中，这通常是并列的话题清单（Leadership, Compute, Talent, and Data），译为“领先算力”存在误译风险。

paragraphs.source: After the acquisition, though, multiple AI labs mostly stopped contracting Scale. This is to avoid Meta having access to the data they demand the most. Some from Scale’s team joined Meta’s Superintelligence group, mostly as leadership as well as part of the safety and evaluations teams. The organization now continues to produce evaluations and retains some data contracts, but is no longer servicing the labs to the extent it previously was.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: After the acquisition, though, multiple AI labs mostly stopped contracting Scale. This is to avoid Meta having access to the data they demand the most. Some from Scale’s team joined Meta’s Superintelligence group, mostly as leadership as well as part of the safety and evaluations teams. The organization now continues to produce evaluations and retains some data contracts, but is no longer servicing the labs to the extent it previously was.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: After the acquisition, though, multiple AI labs mostly stopped contracting Scale. This is to avoid Meta having access to the data they demand the most. Some from Scale’s team joined Meta’s Superintelligence group, mostly as leadership as well as part of the safety and evaluations teams. The organization now continues to produce evaluations and retains some data contracts, but is no longer servicing the labs to the extent it previously was.

pro.text: 然而，收购完成后，多家 AI 实验室基本终止了与 Scale 的合作。各大实验室借此防止 Meta 接触到其最渴求的数据。部分 Scale 团队成员加入了 Meta 超级智能团队，主要出任管理层，或编入安全与评测团队。如今，该机构虽仍在产出评测结果并保留部分数据合同，但对各大实验室的服务规模已远不及当年。

Meta's acquisition of Scale AI caused other labs to pull back to protect their proprietary data demands.
A massive market gap emerged for high-quality RL data providers.
translation_notes: Translate 'The Ghost of Scale AI' non-literally to capture its lingering influence or the vacuum it left behind (e.g., Scale AI 的幽灵/余波).
Use industry-standard terms for 'evaluations' (模型评测) and 'data contractors' (数据承包商).

issues.description: 中英文之间缺失空格（Meta超级智能团队）；此外，根据翻译注意点要求，行业术语 'evaluations' 应译为“评测”而非“评估”。
同样存在中英文字符未加空格的问题（Meta超级智能团队）。另外，原文的 'Leadership Compute, Talent, and Data' 虽未加逗号，但在 SemiAnalysis 的标题体例中，这通常是并列的话题清单（Leadership, Compute, Talent, and Data），译为“领先算力”存在误译风险。

paragraphs.source: While the tides were already shifting in the direction of other data providers like Surge, Scale left behind a large gap to fill. Who has stepped in to fill this gap?
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: While the tides were already shifting in the direction of other data providers like Surge, Scale left behind a large gap to fill. Who has stepped in to fill this gap?
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: While the tides were already shifting in the direction of other data providers like Surge, Scale left behind a large gap to fill. Who has stepped in to fill this gap?

pro.text: 尽管行业风向早已开始向 Surge 等其他数据提供商倾斜，但 Scale 离场后仍留下了巨大的市场真空。究竟是谁填补了这一空白？

sections.title: During a Gold Rush, Sell Shovels. In an RL Scaling Boom…
sections.title_translation: 淘金热中卖铲子，在强化学习扩展热潮中……

paragraphs.source: During a Gold Rush, sell shovels. In an RL Scaling Boom, sell RL environments. More than 35 companies have popped up whose goal is to do exactly this across a variety of domains.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: During a Gold Rush, sell shovels. In an RL Scaling Boom, sell RL environments. More than 35 companies have popped up whose goal is to do exactly this across a variety of domains.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: During a Gold Rush, sell shovels. In an RL Scaling Boom, sell RL environments. More than 35 companies have popped up whose goal is to do exactly this across a variety of domains.

pro.text: 淘金热中，卖铲子。在RL规模化（Scaling）热潮中，卖强化学习环境。已有超过35家公司涌现，目标正是在各个领域提供此类环境。

applied_terms: Retain the 'Sell Shovels' idiom (卖铲子) as it is widely understood in Chinese tech/VC circles.
Differentiate 'multi-turn' (多轮交互) from 'single shot' (单次/零样本提示).
Translate 'high fidelity' as '高保真' in the context of task simulation.

understanding.role_in_article: Introduces the market's response to the Scale AI gap: a boom in startups building RL environments as infrastructure.
understanding.relation_to_previous: Directly answers the previous section's concluding question by introducing the 35+ companies stepping in to fill the void.
understanding.relation_to_next: Highlights coding environments as the highest in demand, seamlessly transitioning into the technical deep dive of how they are built.
key_points: Startups are capitalizing on the RL boom by selling RL environments ('shovels').
Environments are combined (Slack + browser + editor) to simulate high-fidelity, multi-turn software tasks.
Coding environments represent the peak of current market demand.
translation_notes: Retain the 'Sell Shovels' idiom (卖铲子) as it is widely understood in Chinese tech/VC circles.
Differentiate 'multi-turn' (多轮交互) from 'single shot' (单次/零样本提示).
Translate 'high fidelity' as '高保真' in the context of task simulation.

issues.description: 术语'RL Scaling'的翻译'RL扩展'不够精确，未能完全传达原文中'Scaling'作为规模化、扩展能力核心概念的含义。
原文'like mid-training'是举例说明，译文'例如中期训练'将其处理为并列的独立阶段，可能模糊了'反馈到训练的不同阶段'与'中期训练'之间的从属关系。
句子结构稍显松散，'更多轮次进行'与'单次完成'的对比可以更紧凑有力。分号后的例子与前半句的逻辑衔接可以更流畅。
术语'exposes'译为'暴露'在中文技术语境中略显生硬，更常见的译法是'提供'、'公开'或'暴露（API）'。此处'工具定义'的暴露，更接近'提供接口定义'。
译文'洞察支撑当今进步的基础设施和工程努力'稍显冗长，且'工程努力'的表述不够地道，有翻译腔。

paragraphs.source: One set of companies focus on cloning websites. For example, environment companies hire overseas developers to replicate the UI of sites like DoorDash or Uber Eats and sell the mockups to labs. Labs then train agents to navigate the site so in production the agent can perform required functions reliably and consistently.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: One set of companies focus on cloning websites. For example, environment companies hire overseas developers to replicate the UI of sites like DoorDash or Uber Eats and sell the mockups to labs. Labs then train agents to navigate the site so in production the agent can perform required functions reliably and consistently.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: One set of companies focus on cloning websites. For example, environment companies hire overseas developers to replicate the UI of sites like DoorDash or Uber Eats and sell the mockups to labs. Labs then train agents to navigate the site so in production the agent can perform required functions reliably and consistently.

pro.text: 一类公司专注于克隆网站。例如，环境公司雇佣海外开发者复制DoorDash或Uber Eats等网站的UI，并将模拟界面出售给实验室。实验室随后训练智能体在这些网站中导航，以便在生产环境中，智能体能够可靠且一致地执行所需功能。

paragraphs.source: These “UI gyms” often cost about $20,000 per website, and OpenAI has purchased hundreds of sites for ChatGPT Agent training and development. These environments are a one time purchase and are reused for future models. Trajectories and logs from previous runs are preserved and fed back into various stages of training, like mid-training.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: These “UI gyms” often cost about $20,000 per website, and OpenAI has purchased hundreds of sites for ChatGPT Agent training and development. These environments are a one time purchase and are reused for future models. Trajectories and logs from previous runs are preserved and fed back into various stages of training, like mid-training.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: These “UI gyms” often cost about $20,000 per website, and OpenAI has purchased hundreds of sites for ChatGPT Agent training and development. These environments are a one time purchase and are reused for future models. Trajectories and logs from previous runs are preserved and fed back into various stages of training, like mid-training.

pro.text: 这些“UI训练场”通常每个网站售价约2万美元，OpenAI已为ChatGPT智能体的训练和开发采购了数百个网站。这些环境是一次性购买，并可复用于未来的模型。先前运行的轨迹和日志会被保留，并反馈到训练的不同阶段，例如在中期训练中使用。

paragraphs.source: Other companies branched out into more sophisticated environments than just a website. Examples include Slack, Salesforce, AWS terminals, Microsoft OneDrive, Gmail, Discord, and Atlassian. The goal is for agents to autonomously operate in these software platforms, learning and better understanding how to navigate and operate within them.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Other companies branched out into more sophisticated environments than just a website. Examples include Slack, Salesforce, AWS terminals, Microsoft OneDrive, Gmail, Discord, and Atlassian. The goal is for agents to autonomously operate in these software platforms, learning and better understanding how to navigate and operate within them.

The goal is for agents to autonomously operate in these software platforms, learning and better understanding how to navigate and operate within them.

pro.text: 其他公司则拓展至比单纯网站更复杂的环境，例如Slack、Salesforce、AWS终端、Microsoft OneDrive、Gmail、Discord和Atlassian。目标是让智能体能在这些软件平台中自主操作，学习并更好地理解如何在其内部导航和运行。

paragraphs.source: These platforms, once built, can be combined to represent higher fidelity tasks and workloads. Putting together platforms like Slack, an API endpoint to a browser, and a coding editor can construct an increasingly realistic software task for the model. This enables interactions to be more multi-turn as opposed to a single shot, for example pinging the model halfway through its process via Slack to request a feature change.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: These platforms, once built, can be combined to represent higher fidelity tasks and workloads. Putting together platforms like Slack, an API endpoint to a browser, and a coding editor can construct an increasingly realistic software task for the model. This enables interactions to be more multi-turn as opposed to a single shot, for example pinging the model halfway through its process via Slack to request a feature change.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: These platforms, once built, can be combined to represent higher fidelity tasks and workloads. Putting together platforms like Slack, an API endpoint to a browser, and a coding editor can construct an increasingly realistic software task for the model. This enables interactions to be more multi-turn as opposed to a single shot, for example pinging the model halfway through its process via Slack to request a feature change.

pro.text: 这些平台一旦构建完成，便可组合起来，用以模拟更高保真度的任务与工作负载。将Slack、浏览器API端点以及代码编辑器等平台整合，能为模型构建出日益逼真的软件任务。这使得交互模式从单次提示转向多轮对话成为可能——例如，在任务执行中途通过Slack向模型发送消息，要求其调整某项功能。

paragraphs.source: Some of the companies building these sorts of environments, include Habitat, DeepTune, Fleet, Vmax, Turing, Mechanize, Preference Model, Bespoke Labs, Veris.ai and many others. Even within these companies there is significant diversity in quality or focus. Some companies focus on UI gyms, like Turing, while others like Mechanize focus on software engineering tasks. Almost all companies are seed stage companies with less than 20 employees, focused on 1 to 3 customers at most.

Even within these companies there is significant diversity in quality or focus. Some companies focus on UI gyms, like Turing, while others like Mechanize focus on software engineering tasks. paragraphs.source: Most aforementioned companies close source their environments and serve them in exclusive contracts to the labs. Some, however, like Prime Intellect open source theirs and are fostering the Environments Hub, which aims to be a one stop shop for RL environments.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Most aforementioned companies close source their environments and serve them in exclusive contracts to the labs. Some, however, like Prime Intellect open source theirs and are fostering the [Environments Hub](https://www.primeintellect.ai/blog/environments), which aims to be a one stop shop for RL environments.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Most aforementioned companies close source their environments and serve them in exclusive contracts to the labs. Some, however, like Prime Intellect open source theirs and are fostering the Environments Hub, which aims to be a one stop shop for RL environments.

pro.text: 上述大多数公司都将其环境闭源，并通过独家合同提供给实验室。然而，也有一些公司，如 Prime Intellect，选择将其环境开源，并正在培育旨在成为强化学习环境一站式商店的环境中心。

paragraphs.source: Others are building tooling for environments. HUD for example has tooling that allows for the wrapping any given software (e.g., a game, browser, google sheets) in a dockerized container, enabling its use as a scalable RL environment. Each container has two layers: the environment backend (the actual software being wrapped) and an MCP server that sits on top and exposes tool definitions the agent can call. When an agent issues a tool call like click(x,y) or type(text), the MCP server translates it into an action on the underlying software and returns the resulting observation. This is generally scaled into many parallel instances. Each task includes a prompt, setup conditions, and success criteria that return a reward signal.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Others are building tooling for environments. [HUD](https://www.hud.so/) for example has tooling that allows for the wrapping any given software (e.g., a game, browser, google sheets) in a dockerized container, enabling its use as a scalable RL environment. Each container has two layers: the environment backend (the actual software being wrapped) and an MCP server that sits on top and exposes tool definitions the agent can call. When an agent issues a tool call like `click(x,y)` or `type(text)`, the MCP server translates it into an action on the underlying software and returns the resulting observation. This is generally scaled into many parallel instances. Each task includes a prompt, setup conditions, and success criteria that return a reward signal. Every tool call and observation is captured via telemetry, which is useful for debugging but also collected and fed into training at later stages.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Others are building tooling for environments. HUD for example has tooling that allows for the wrapping any given software (e.g., a game, browser, google sheets) in a dockerized container, enabling its use as a scalable RL environment. Each container has two layers: the environment backend (the actual software being wrapped) and an MCP server that sits on top and exposes tool definitions the agent can call. When an agent issues a tool call like click(x,y) or type(text), the MCP server translates it into an action on the underlying software and returns the resulting observation. This is generally scaled into many parallel instances. Each task includes a prompt, setup conditions, and success criteria that return a reward signal. Every tool call and observation is captured via telemetry, which is useful for debugging but also collected and fed into training at later stages.

pro.text: 其他公司则在为环境构建工具。例如，HUD提供的工具可以将任何给定软件（如游戏、浏览器、Google Sheets）封装在 Docker 容器中，使其成为可扩展的强化学习环境。每个容器包含两层：环境后端（被封装的实际软件）以及位于其上层的 MCP 服务器，后者负责提供智能体可调用的工具定义。当智能体发出如click(x,y)或type(text)这样的工具调用时，MCP 服务器会将其转换为对底层软件的操作，并返回结果观察值。这一过程通常会被扩展到许多并行实例中。每个任务都包含一个提示、设置条件和成功标准，这些条件会返回奖励信号。

句子结构稍显松散，'更多轮次进行'与'单次完成'的对比可以更紧凑有力。分号后的例子与前半句的逻辑衔接可以更流畅。
术语'exposes'译为'暴露'在中文技术语境中略显生硬，更常见的译法是'提供'、'公开'或'暴露（API）'。此处'工具定义'的暴露，更接近'提供接口定义'。
译文'洞察支撑当今进步的基础设施和工程努力'稍显冗长，且'工程努力'的表述不够地道，有翻译腔。

paragraphs.source: The highest in demand environments are coding environments. Understanding how these are built, structured, and assembled can provide a unique view into the infrastructure and engineering effort underpinning the progress we see today.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The highest in demand environments are coding environments. Understanding how these are built, structured, and assembled can provide a unique view into the infrastructure and engineering effort underpinning the progress we see today.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The highest in demand environments are coding environments. Understanding how these are built, structured, and assembled can provide a unique view into the infrastructure and engineering effort underpinning the progress we see today.

pro.text: 目前需求最高的环境是编码环境。了解这些环境的构建、架构与集成方式，为我们提供了一个独特视角，得以窥见支撑当前AI进步的基础设施与工程实践。

applied_terms: Retain the 'Sell Shovels' idiom (卖铲子) as it is widely understood in Chinese tech/VC circles.
Differentiate 'multi-turn' (多轮交互) from 'single shot' (单次/零样本提示).
Translate 'high fidelity' as '高保真' in the context of task simulation.

understanding.role_in_article: Introduces the market's response to the Scale AI gap: a boom in startups building RL environments as infrastructure.
understanding.relation_to_previous: Directly answers the previous section's concluding question by introducing the 35+ companies stepping in to fill the void.
understanding.relation_to_next: Highlights coding environments as the highest in demand, seamlessly transitioning into the technical deep dive of how they are built.
key_points: Startups are capitalizing on the RL boom by selling RL environments ('shovels').
Environments are combined (Slack + browser + editor) to simulate high-fidelity, multi-turn software tasks.
Coding environments represent the peak of current market demand.
translation_notes: Retain the 'Sell Shovels' idiom (卖铲子) as it is widely understood in Chinese tech/VC circles.
Differentiate 'multi-turn' (多轮交互) from 'single shot' (单次/零样本提示).
Translate 'high fidelity' as '高保真' in the context of task simulation.

sections.title: So You Want to Make a Coding Environment?
sections.title_translation: 那么，你想打造一个编程环境？

paragraphs.source: Demand for coding environments is so high that we believe defunct startups are getting acquired specifically for the value of another private GitHub repo to make environments out of. Understanding why these repos are so valuable requires understanding how coding environments are actually constructed. The process is more involved than it might seem.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Demand for coding environments is so high that we believe defunct startups are getting acquired specifically for the value of another private GitHub repo to make environments out of. Understanding why these repos are so valuable requires understanding how coding environments are actually constructed. The process is more involved than it might seem.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Demand for coding environments is so high that we believe defunct startups are getting acquired specifically for the value of another private GitHub repo to make environments out of. Understanding why these repos are so valuable requires understanding how coding environments are actually constructed. The process is more involved than it might seem.

pro.text: 对编程环境的需求如此之高，以至于我们认为，一些已倒闭的初创公司被收购，纯粹是看中了其手中另一个私有的 GitHub 代码库——那是构建环境的原材料。要理解这些代码库为何如此宝贵，需要了解编程环境究竟是如何构建的。这个过程比看起来要复杂得多。

applied_terms: Ensure precise technical translation of 'execution-based verification' (基于执行的验证).
The logic of 'failing before, passing after' (打补丁前失败，打补丁后通过) must be translated with absolute logical clarity.
Translate 'test patch' and 'solution patch' distinctly (测试补丁 vs. 修复补丁).

understanding.role_in_article: Serves as a technical deep dive to prove the complexity of RL environments, justifying their high market value and startup valuations.
understanding.relation_to_previous: Fulfills the promise of explaining the mechanics behind the coding environments introduced in the previous section.
understanding.relation_to_next: After establishing the technical difficulty of one domain (coding), it zooms back out to discuss the broader industry applying this to multiple domains (Data Foundries).
key_points: Private GitHub repos are highly valuable assets for constructing unique RL environments.
Tasks undergo rigorous 'execution-based verification' in containerized environments.
Strict pass/fail logic is applied to test patches to validate tasks before they are used for training.
translation_notes: Ensure precise technical translation of 'execution-based verification' (基于执行的验证).
The logic of 'failing before, passing after' (打补丁前失败，打补丁后通过) must be translated with absolute logical clarity.
Translate 'test patch' and 'solution patch' distinctly (测试补丁 vs. 修复补丁).

issues.description: 译文将原文的‘defunct startups are getting acquired specifically for the value of another private GitHub repo’处理为一个较长的分句，虽然准确，但节奏稍显拖沓，削弱了原文紧凑、略带讽刺的‘insider’语气。
原文的筛选条件是以冒号引导的并列列举。译文使用了顿号连接，但‘对问题有充分描述、涉及多个文件等’这一部分，将‘have sufficient descriptions of the problem’和‘impact more than one file’这两个独立条件用顿号简单并列，在中文中可能被误解为‘对问题有充分描述且涉及多个文件’。虽然加了‘等’字，但逻辑清晰度有提升空间。
译文准确传达了三个条件，但‘所有之前通过的测试继续保持通过’这个表述，虽然正确，在技术语境下不如‘所有原先通过的测试在打补丁后依然通过’或‘所有既有的通过测试不受影响’来得直接和地道。‘继续保持通过’略显口语化。
句子较长，包含多个步骤和方法列举。虽然译文已尝试使用分号和列举，但整个句子负担仍然较重，读者需要一口气消化‘证明方式’下的‘安装’步骤和‘四种方法’的详细内容。
译文将‘rollouts’译为‘轨迹推演’是正确的。最后一句‘吞吐量的提升往往伴随着速度的降低’表述上存在逻辑矛盾。原文是‘throughput comes at the expense of speed’，意指‘（追求）高吞吐量是以（牺牲）速度为代价的’。译文‘提升伴随着降低’容易产生歧义，似乎两者在同时变化。

paragraphs.source: SWE-rebench is a benchmark that aggregates thousands of Python tasks from GitHub and showcases how these environments are constructed. The process it employs is also automated, which is what we expect the labs to be doing.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: SWE-rebench is a benchmark that aggregates thousands of Python tasks from GitHub and showcases how these environments are constructed. The process it employs is also automated, which is what we expect the labs to be doing.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: SWE-rebench is a benchmark that aggregates thousands of Python tasks from GitHub and showcases how these environments are constructed. The process it employs is also automated, which is what we expect the labs to be doing.

pro.text: SWE-rebench 是一个基准测试，它汇集了来自 GitHub 的数千个 Python 任务，并展示了这些环境的构建方式。它所采用的流程也是自动化的，这正是我们预期各大实验室会采用的做法。

paragraphs.source: The pipeline starts with downloading the GitHub Archive, containing 30k repos and 450k PRs with permissive licenses. This dataset is then filtered for several categories: PRs have to be resolved, merged to the main branch, have sufficient descriptions of the problem, impact more than one file, etc. PRs must introduce or modify test files as that is what is used for grading. For example, if a model’s patch causes previously failing tests to pass (without breaking others), the task is marked as solved.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The pipeline starts with downloading the GitHub Archive, containing 30k repos and 450k PRs with permissive licenses. This dataset is then filtered for several categories: PRs have to be resolved, merged to the main branch, have sufficient descriptions of the problem, impact more than one file, etc. PRs must introduce or modify test files as that is what is used for grading. For example, if a model’s patch causes previously failing tests to pass (without breaking others), the task is marked as solved.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The pipeline starts with downloading the GitHub Archive, containing 30k repos and 450k PRs with permissive licenses. This dataset is then filtered for several categories: PRs have to be resolved, merged to the main branch, have sufficient descriptions of the problem, impact more than one file, etc. PRs must introduce or modify test files as that is what is used for grading. For example, if a model’s patch causes previously failing tests to pass (without breaking others), the task is marked as solved.

pro.text: 该流程首先从下载 GitHub 存档开始，其中包含 3 万个代码库和 45 万个采用宽松许可证的 PR。随后，该数据集会经过多轮筛选，条件包括：PR 必须已解决、已合并到主分支、对问题有充分描述、且影响多个文件等。PR 还必须引入或修改测试文件，因为这是用于评分的依据。例如，如果模型的补丁使得先前失败的测试得以通过（且不破坏其他测试），则该任务被标记为已解决。

paragraphs.source: To automate environment configuration, an LLM generates installation instructions for each task. The model reads relevant files in the repository (README, setup.py, requirements.txt, Docker files), then synthesizes a structured JSON “recipe” specifying the Python version, dependency installation commands, and test execution commands.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: To automate environment configuration, an LLM generates installation instructions for each task. The model reads relevant files in the repository (README, setup.py, requirements.txt, Docker files), then synthesizes a structured JSON “recipe” specifying the Python version, dependency installation commands, and test execution commands.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: To automate environment configuration, an LLM generates installation instructions for each task. The model reads relevant files in the repository (README, setup.py, requirements.txt, Docker files), then synthesizes a structured JSON “recipe” specifying the Python version, dependency installation commands, and test execution commands.

pro.text: 为了实现环境配置的自动化，LLM 会为每个任务生成安装指令。模型读取代码库中的相关文件（如 README、setup.py、requirements.txt、Docker 文件），然后综合生成一个结构化的 JSON“配方”，其中指定了 Python 版本、依赖安装命令和测试执行命令。

原文的筛选条件是以冒号引导的并列列举。译文使用了顿号连接，但‘对问题有充分描述、涉及多个文件等’这一部分，将‘have sufficient descriptions of the problem’和‘impact more than one file’这两个独立条件用顿号简单并列，在中文中可能被误解为‘对问题有充分描述且涉及多个文件’。虽然加了‘等’字，但逻辑清晰度有提升空间。
译文准确传达了三个条件，但‘所有之前通过的测试继续保持通过’这个表述，虽然正确，在技术语境下不如‘所有原先通过的测试在打补丁后依然通过’或‘所有既有的通过测试不受影响’来得直接和地道。‘继续保持通过’略显口语化。
句子较长，包含多个步骤和方法列举。虽然译文已尝试使用分号和列举，但整个句子负担仍然较重，读者需要一口气消化‘证明方式’下的‘安装’步骤和‘四种方法’的详细内容。
译文将‘rollouts’译为‘轨迹推演’是正确的。最后一句‘吞吐量的提升往往伴随着速度的降低’表述上存在逻辑矛盾。原文是‘throughput comes at the expense of speed’，意指‘（追求）高吞吐量是以（牺牲）速度为代价的’。译文‘提升伴随着降低’容易产生歧义，似乎两者在同时变化。

paragraphs.source: Each candidate task then undergoes execution-based verification. The environment is instantiated in a container, and tests from the PR’s test patch are executed. A task is considered valid only if at least one test fails before applying the solution patch, all initially failing tests pass after the patch is applied, and any tests that passed before continue to pass. After all the filtering, we end up with 21,336 tasks from the 450k we started.

A task is considered valid only if at least one test fails before applying the solution patch, all initially failing tests pass after the patch is applied, and any tests that passed before continue to pass. After all the filtering, we end up with 21,336 tasks from the 450k we started.

pro.text: 随后，每个候选任务都会经过基于执行的验证。环境在容器中实例化，并执行来自PR测试补丁的测试。一个任务只有在满足以下所有条件时才被视为有效：第一，在应用修复补丁前，至少有一个测试失败；第二，应用补丁后，所有先前失败的测试均通过；第三，所有原先已通过的测试在补丁应用后依然通过。经过所有筛选后，我们从最初的45万个任务中最终得到了21,336个有效任务。

paragraphs.source: But most PRs do not meet the strict criteria, which is why the yield is low. SWE-smith demonstrates this by having an LLM install repositories at their latest commit, then synthesizing bugs through four methods: prompting a model to introduce subtle errors into working functions, applying deterministic AST transformations like flipping if/else blocks or removing loops, using an LLM to semantically reverse real PRs against the current codebase, and combining validated single-function bugs into harder multi-file tasks. Every candidate is validated by checking if it breaks at least one existing test.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: But most PRs do not meet the strict criteria, which is why the yield is low. SWE-smith demonstrates this by having an LLM install repositories at their latest commit, then synthesizing bugs through four methods: prompting a model to introduce subtle errors into working functions, applying deterministic AST transformations like flipping if/else blocks or removing loops, using an LLM to semantically reverse real PRs against the current codebase, and combining validated single-function bugs into harder multi-file tasks. Every candidate is validated by checking if it breaks at least one existing test.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: But most PRs do not meet the strict criteria, which is why the yield is low. SWE-smith demonstrates this by having an LLM install repositories at their latest commit, then synthesizing bugs through four methods: prompting a model to introduce subtle errors into working functions, applying deterministic AST transformations like flipping if/else blocks or removing loops, using an LLM to semantically reverse real PRs against the current codebase, and combining validated single-function bugs into harder multi-file tasks. Every candidate is validated by checking if it breaks at least one existing test.

pro.text: 但大多数 PR 无法满足这些严格标准，这正是良率低的原因。SWE-smith 通过以下流程证明了这一点：首先，让 LLM 安装代码库的最新提交版本。接着，通过四种方法合成缺陷：1) 提示模型在正常函数中引入细微错误；2) 应用确定性 AST 转换（例如翻转 if/else 代码块或移除循环）；3) 使用 LLM，根据当前代码库的语义来反转真实的 PR；4) 将已验证的单函数缺陷组合成更困难的多文件任务。每个候选缺陷都会经过验证，检查其是否至少破坏了一个现有测试。

paragraphs.source: Importantly, these approaches aren't mutually exclusive. PR mining captures realistic bug patterns from actual development history and synthetic generation provides volume and coverage across the entire codebase. A lab with access to private repositories could run both pipelines against the same environments, first mining PRs then improving them with synthetic bugs. This combined approach is likely a strong approximation for how frontier labs are constructing RL environments for code.

A lab with access to private repositories could run both pipelines against the same environments, first mining PRs then improving them with synthetic bugs. This combined approach is likely a strong approximation for how frontier labs are constructing RL environments for code.

pro.text: 重要的是，这些方法并非互斥。PR挖掘能从真实的开发历史中捕获现实的错误模式，而合成生成则能提供覆盖整个代码库的体量和广度。一个拥有私有代码库访问权限的实验室，可以针对同一环境同时运行这两条流水线：先挖掘PR，再用合成错误对其进行增强。这种组合方法很可能近似地反映了前沿实验室如何为代码构建RL环境。

paragraphs.source: At scale, these pipelines produce tasks in the tens of thousands. DeepSeek ended up using 24,667 coding tasks extracted from GitHub for the training of V3.2. We know, from other labs like Kimi, that the infrastructure developed can support the instantiation of 10,000+ instances simultaneously. Generally speaking, the more difficult the task the more rollouts are needed during training. This is due to the problem being harder to solve, and the more rollouts, the more “shots on goal” the model has. However, this comes at the expense of each rollout being slower as throughput comes at the expense of speed.

We know, from other labs like Kimi, that the infrastructure developed can support the instantiation of 10,000+ instances simultaneously. Generally speaking, the more difficult the task the more rollouts are needed during training. This is due to the problem being harder to solve, and the more rollouts, the more “shots on goal” the model has. However, this comes at the expense of each rollout being slower as throughput comes at the expense of speed.

We know, from other labs like Kimi, that the infrastructure developed can support the instantiation of 10,000+ instances simultaneously. Generally speaking, the more difficult the task the more rollouts are needed during training. This is due to the problem being harder to solve, and the more rollouts, the more “shots on goal” the model has. However, this comes at the expense of each rollout being slower as throughput comes at the expense of speed.

pro.text: 在规模化层面，这些流水线能产出数以万计的任务。例如，DeepSeek最终使用了从GitHub提取的24,667个编码任务来训练其V3.2模型。我们从Kimi等其他实验室了解到，所开发的基础设施能够支持同时实例化超过10,000个环境实例。一般而言，任务难度越高，训练期间所需的轨迹推演就越多。这是因为问题更难解决，而更多的推演意味着模型拥有更多的“尝试机会”。然而，这是以降低每次推演的速度为代价的——追求高吞吐量就会牺牲速度。

译文准确传达了三个条件，但‘所有之前通过的测试继续保持通过’这个表述，虽然正确，在技术语境下不如‘所有原先通过的测试在打补丁后依然通过’或‘所有既有的通过测试不受影响’来得直接和地道。‘继续保持通过’略显口语化。
句子较长，包含多个步骤和方法列举。虽然译文已尝试使用分号和列举，但整个句子负担仍然较重，读者需要一口气消化‘证明方式’下的‘安装’步骤和‘四种方法’的详细内容。
译文将‘rollouts’译为‘轨迹推演’是正确的。最后一句‘吞吐量的提升往往伴随着速度的降低’表述上存在逻辑矛盾。原文是‘throughput comes at the expense of speed’，意指‘（追求）高吞吐量是以（牺牲）速度为代价的’。译文‘提升伴随着降低’容易产生歧义，似乎两者在同时变化。

applied_terms: Ensure precise technical translation of 'execution-based verification' (基于执行的验证).
The logic of 'failing before, passing after' (打补丁前失败，打补丁后通过) must be translated with absolute logical clarity.
Translate 'test patch' and 'solution patch' distinctly (测试补丁 vs. 修复补丁).

understanding.role_in_article: Serves as a technical deep dive to prove the complexity of RL environments, justifying their high market value and startup valuations.
understanding.relation_to_previous: Fulfills the promise of explaining the mechanics behind the coding environments introduced in the previous section.
understanding.relation_to_next: After establishing the technical difficulty of one domain (coding), it zooms back out to discuss the broader industry applying this to multiple domains (Data Foundries).
key_points: Private GitHub repos are highly valuable assets for constructing unique RL environments.
Tasks undergo rigorous 'execution-based verification' in containerized environments.
Strict pass/fail logic is applied to test patches to validate tasks before they are used for training.
translation_notes: Ensure precise technical translation of 'execution-based verification' (基于执行的验证).
The logic of 'failing before, passing after' (打补丁前失败，打补丁后通过) must be translated with absolute logical clarity.
Translate 'test patch' and 'solution patch' distinctly (测试补丁 vs. 修复补丁).

sections.title: Data Foundries and Expert Contractors
sections.title_translation: 数据代工厂与专家外包

paragraphs.source: The reason environment tooling in general is useful is because environments are being created across many different domains: Chip design environments so models can aid in the design process, accounting ones for model to do taxes, and EHR software for medical use workflows are but few examples.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The reason environment tooling in general is useful is because environments are being created across many different domains: Chip design environments so models can aid in the design process, accounting ones for model to do taxes, and EHR software for medical use workflows are but few examples.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The reason environment tooling in general is useful is because environments are being created across many different domains: Chip design environments so models can aid in the design process, accounting ones for model to do taxes, and EHR software for medical use workflows are but few examples.

pro.text: 环境工具之所以普遍有用，是因为各类环境正在众多领域涌现：芯片设计环境能让模型辅助设计流程；会计环境用于处理税务；还有用于医疗工作流的电子健康记录(EHR)软件。这些都只是少数例子。

applied_terms: Translate 'Data foundries' as '数据工厂' or '数据代工' to reflect the industrial scale.
Ensure 'EHR software' is localized correctly as '电子健康记录(EHR)软件'.
Maintain an objective, analytical tone when discussing geopolitical VC dynamics and domestic lab compute allocation.

understanding.role_in_article: Expands the scope from coding to general domains and introduces geopolitical and market fragmentation dynamics.
understanding.relation_to_previous: Extrapolates the technical complexity of coding environments to other specialized fields like chip design and healthcare.
understanding.relation_to_next: Concludes that RL data procurement is highly fragmented (unlike the pre-training era), setting up the analysis of specific lab buying patterns.
key_points: RL environments are expanding into diverse, highly specialized domains (EHR, chip design, accounting).
Chinese VCs are heavily investing in local data foundries to serve domestic labs at lower costs.
Data procurement in the RL era is highly fragmented, diverging from the uniform data access of the pre-training era.
translation_notes: Translate 'Data foundries' as '数据工厂' or '数据代工' to reflect the industrial scale.
Ensure 'EHR software' is localized correctly as '电子健康记录(EHR)软件'.
Maintain an objective, analytical tone when discussing geopolitical VC dynamics and domestic lab compute allocation.

issues.description: 句子结构略显松散，并列项之间的逻辑层次和节奏感可以优化，以更贴近原文紧凑、举例式的分析口吻。
术语 'rubrics' 译为'评分量表'是可行的，但在AI评估领域，'评估标准'或'评分准则'可能更常用。'GDPval' 是首次出现，建议加注英文。
'we believe' 的翻译'我们相信'语气略显主观和不确定。在分析师语境中，这通常代表基于调研的判断，可选用更坚定或更符合行业报告语气的措辞。
原文是 'access to these RL environments played a huge part in increasing the capabilities for...'。译文'获取这些强化学习环境'是准确的，但'发挥了巨大作用'的表述稍显平淡，未能完全传达 'played a huge part' 所暗示的关键性、决定性作用。
段落内部逻辑衔接可以更紧密。'例如'引出的具体例子与前后句的概括性论述之间，转折略显生硬。最后一句的'当然'让步，削弱了前文论断的连贯性。
'MCP' 是首次出现且未在提供的术语表中。根据上下文（连接模型以提取信息），'MCP' 很可能指 'Model Context Protocol'（模型上下文协议），这是一种让模型与工具/数据源交互的协议。译为'模型控制协议'可能不准确。
'具有巨大的潜力' 表述稍显通用和保守。原文 'significant upside' 在商业/投资语境中更强调“上行空间”、“增值潜力”，带有更明确的机遇和回报预期。

paragraphs.source: While software engineers construct the environment itself, often the workflows are created, described, and graded by domain specific contractors involved in the environment creation process. Finance professionals help define financial tasks, doctors for medicine, lawyers for law, etc.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: While software engineers construct the environment itself, often the workflows are created, described, and graded by domain specific contractors involved in the environment creation process. Finance professionals help define financial tasks, doctors for medicine, lawyers for law, etc.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: While software engineers construct the environment itself, often the workflows are created, described, and graded by domain specific contractors involved in the environment creation process. Finance professionals help define financial tasks, doctors for medicine, lawyers for law, etc.

pro.text: 虽然软件工程师构建环境本身，但工作流程通常由参与环境创建过程的特定领域承包商来创建、描述和评级。金融专业人士帮助定义金融任务，医生负责医疗领域，律师负责法律领域，等等。

Ensure 'EHR software' is localized correctly as '电子健康记录(EHR)软件'.
Maintain an objective, analytical tone when discussing geopolitical VC dynamics and domestic lab compute allocation.

paragraphs.source: Labs will go through human data contractor firms, who we will touch on shortly, who are looped in for their input on specific task creation. Contracts typically last at least a quarter and can be part time or full time. Contractors design tasks, write expected solutions, specify reward signals, and in some cases, grade model solutions. These reward signals can be in the form of rubrics, the writing of which can also involve contractors, or strict verifiers. These are the sort of experts that would be contracted to help build evals like GDPval.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Labs will go through human data contractor firms, who we will touch on shortly, who are looped in for their input on specific task creation. Contracts typically last at least a quarter and can be part time or full time. Contractors design tasks, write expected solutions, specify reward signals, and in some cases, grade model solutions. These reward signals can be in the form of rubrics, the writing of which can also involve contractors, or strict verifiers. These are the sort of experts that would be contracted to help build evals like GDPval.

Contracts typically last at least a quarter and can be part time or full time. Contractors design tasks, write expected solutions, specify reward signals, and in some cases, grade model solutions. These reward signals can be in the form of rubrics, the writing of which can also involve contractors, or strict verifiers. These are the sort of experts that would be contracted to help build evals like GDPval.

pro.text: 实验室会通过人类数据承包商公司（我们稍后会谈到）来运作，这些公司会参与进来，为特定任务的创建提供意见。合同通常至少持续一个季度，可以是兼职或全职。承包商负责设计任务、撰写预期解决方案、指定奖励信号，在某些情况下，还会对模型解决方案进行评级。这些奖励信号可以表现为评分准则(rubrics)，准则的撰写也可能涉及承包商或严格的验证器。这类专家正是会被聘请来帮助构建像 GDPval（一种评估基准）这类评估的。

issues.description: 句子结构略显松散，并列项之间的逻辑层次和节奏感可以优化，以更贴近原文紧凑、举例式的分析口吻。
术语 'rubrics' 译为'评分量表'是可行的，但在AI评估领域，'评估标准'或'评分准则'可能更常用。'GDPval' 是首次出现，建议加注英文。
'we believe' 的翻译'我们相信'语气略显主观和不确定。在分析师语境中，这通常代表基于调研的判断，可选用更坚定或更符合行业报告语气的措辞。
原文是 'access to these RL environments played a huge part in increasing the capabilities for...'。译文'获取这些强化学习环境'是准确的，但'发挥了巨大作用'的表述稍显平淡，未能完全传达 'played a huge part' 所暗示的关键性、决定性作用。
段落内部逻辑衔接可以更紧密。'例如'引出的具体例子与前后句的概括性论述之间，转折略显生硬。最后一句的'当然'让步，削弱了前文论断的连贯性。
'MCP' 是首次出现且未在提供的术语表中。根据上下文（连接模型以提取信息），'MCP' 很可能指 'Model Context Protocol'（模型上下文协议），这是一种让模型与工具/数据源交互的协议。译为'模型控制协议'可能不准确。
'具有巨大的潜力' 表述稍显通用和保守。原文 'significant upside' 在商业/投资语境中更强调“上行空间”、“增值潜力”，带有更明确的机遇和回报预期。

paragraphs.source: Firms like Mercor, Handshake, Surge, and Aboda.ai are used to hire these experts across many professional domains. Surge is the more established and larger player, with revenue we believe is closer to $1B ARR.

pro.text: 像 Mercor、Handshake、Surge 和 Aboda.ai 这样的公司被用来跨众多专业领域雇佣这些专家。Surge 是其中更成熟、规模更大的参与者，据我们分析，其年度经常性收入(ARR)已接近10亿美元。

paragraphs.source: Coding is in the most amount of demand, but spending on non-professional domains like photography, music, and design has picked up. As mentioned, the labs want to not just increase the number of tasks they post-train over for a given domain, but also the breadth and variety.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Coding is in the most amount of demand, but spending on non-professional domains like photography, music, and design has picked up. As mentioned, the labs want to not just increase the number of tasks they post-train over for a given domain, but also the breadth and variety.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Coding is in the most amount of demand, but spending on non-professional domains like photography, music, and design has picked up. As mentioned, the labs want to not just increase the number of tasks they post-train over for a given domain, but also the breadth and variety.

pro.text: 编码领域的需求量最大，但在非专业领域如摄影、音乐和设计上的支出也已增加。如前所述，实验室不仅希望增加他们在特定领域进行后期训练的任务数量，还希望扩展任务的广度和多样性。

paragraphs.source: Revenue for these providers is mostly concentrated around western labs like Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google. However, we think Surge is also active internationally, selling to Chinese labs like Moonshot and Z.ai. Indeed, we believe access to these RL environments played a huge part in increasing the capabilities for Kimi K2 Thinking and GLM-4.6. When companies advertise increased capabilities in PowerPoint deck or Excel sheet creation, that is directly downstream of additional RL training.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Revenue for these providers is mostly concentrated around western labs like Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google. However, we think Surge is also active internationally, selling to Chinese labs like Moonshot and Z.ai. Indeed, we believe access to these RL environments played a huge part in increasing the capabilities for Kimi K2 Thinking and GLM-4.6. When companies advertise increased capabilities in PowerPoint deck or Excel sheet creation, that is directly downstream of additional RL training.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Revenue for these providers is mostly concentrated around western labs like Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google. However, we think Surge is also active internationally, selling to Chinese labs like Moonshot and Z.ai. Indeed, we believe access to these RL environments played a huge part in increasing the capabilities for Kimi K2 Thinking and GLM-4.6. When companies advertise increased capabilities in PowerPoint deck or Excel sheet creation, that is directly downstream of additional RL training.

pro.text: 这些供应商的营收主要集中于Anthropic、OpenAI和Google等西方实验室。然而，我们认为Surge在国际上也相当活跃，向月之暗面和Z.ai等中国实验室销售服务。事实上，我们认为，能否获取这些强化学习环境，是Kimi K2 Thinking和GLM-4.6能力得以大幅提升的关键因素。当公司在宣传其制作PowerPoint演示文稿或Excel表格的能力有所提升时，这直接源于额外的强化学习训练。

paragraphs.source: Chinese VC firms are actively trying to stand up Chinese data foundry competitors so they can fully serve the local ecosystem at cheaper prices than western ones. Most Chinese labs are still early to scaling RL: Qwen is currently spending around 5% of their pre-training compute on post-training. Successful homegrown data foundry business will drastically accelerate the transition, compute permitting, of course.

pro.text: 中国的风险投资机构正积极扶持本土的数据代工厂竞争者，旨在以低于西方供应商的价格，全面服务本地生态系统。目前，大多数中国实验室在扩展强化学习方面仍处于早期阶段——例如，通义千问仅将约5%的预训练算力用于后训练。若能成功培育本土数据代工厂业务，将在算力允许的前提下，极大加速整个生态向强化学习范式的转型。

issues.description: 句子结构略显松散，并列项之间的逻辑层次和节奏感可以优化，以更贴近原文紧凑、举例式的分析口吻。
术语 'rubrics' 译为'评分量表'是可行的，但在AI评估领域，'评估标准'或'评分准则'可能更常用。'GDPval' 是首次出现，建议加注英文。
'we believe' 的翻译'我们相信'语气略显主观和不确定。在分析师语境中，这通常代表基于调研的判断，可选用更坚定或更符合行业报告语气的措辞。
原文是 'access to these RL environments played a huge part in increasing the capabilities for...'。译文'获取这些强化学习环境'是准确的，但'发挥了巨大作用'的表述稍显平淡，未能完全传达 'played a huge part' 所暗示的关键性、决定性作用。
段落内部逻辑衔接可以更紧密。'例如'引出的具体例子与前后句的概括性论述之间，转折略显生硬。最后一句的'当然'让步，削弱了前文论断的连贯性。
'MCP' 是首次出现且未在提供的术语表中。根据上下文（连接模型以提取信息），'MCP' 很可能指 'Model Context Protocol'（模型上下文协议），这是一种让模型与工具/数据源交互的协议。译为'模型控制协议'可能不准确。
'具有巨大的潜力' 表述稍显通用和保守。原文 'significant upside' 在商业/投资语境中更强调“上行空间”、“增值潜力”，带有更明确的机遇和回报预期。

paragraphs.source: Firms like Mercor are also producers of a significant amount of grading rubrics, which can be used in a variety of different domains. Currently, most rubrics are written by humans, though there are some companies, like the LLM Data Company, trying to have models write grading rubrics. This can be done through, for example, connecting performant models to highly reliable MCPs to extract information to then be used in a structured rubric.

pro.text: 像Mercor这样的公司也是大量评分标准的生产者，这些标准可用于多种不同领域。目前，大多数评分标准仍由人工撰写，不过也有一些公司，例如The LLM Data Company，正尝试让模型来撰写评分标准。这可以通过例如将高性能模型连接到高度可靠的MCP（Model Context Protocol，模型上下文协议）来提取信息，进而用于构建结构化的评分准则。

sections.title_translation: 各大实验室的采购模式

paragraphs.source: Anthropic
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: ### Anthropic
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Anthropic

pro.text: Anthropic

applied_terms: Translate 'IMO winning model' accurately as '国际奥数(IMO)获奖模型'.
Capture the skepticism in 'stacked on top of each other' (环境的简单堆叠) without making it sound overly dismissive.

understanding.role_in_article: Analyzes specific strategic implementations and procurement behaviors by major players like Anthropic and OpenAI.
understanding.relation_to_previous: Provides concrete examples of the fragmented procurement landscape described in the previous section.
understanding.relation_to_next: Poses a philosophical/strategic question about whether stacked environments lead to AGI, transitioning to real-world economic limits in the next section.
key_points: Different labs have distinct strategies and buying patterns for expert data.
Examples of high-end capabilities include IMO-winning models.
Raises skepticism about whether merely stacking environments is the true path to AGI.
translation_notes: Translate 'IMO winning model' accurately as '国际奥数(IMO)获奖模型'.
Capture the skepticism in 'stacked on top of each other' (环境的简单堆叠) without making it sound overly dismissive.

issues.description: 术语 'UI Gyms' 的翻译不一致。前文（段落5）提到 'UI Gyms' 时未翻译，此处译文为 'UI训练场'。虽然 '训练场' 是 'Gym' 的合理意译，但作为专有名词，全文应保持统一。建议统一为英文原名 'UI Gyms' 或统一为 'UI训练场'，并在首次出现时加注。
译文 '赢得IMO金牌的模型——GPT-5.1 Codex Max的一个版本——受益于...' 在结构上完全忠实，但中文破折号的使用稍显打断阅读流。可以考虑更流畅的表述。
译文 '其庞大的产品经理团队对数亿用户如何实际与这些产品交互有着深刻的洞察，这为定义强大的模型性能应为何样提供了直接信号。' 后半句 '为定义...应为何样' 略显翻译腔，可以更精炼地道。
译文 '通往通用人工智能的道路，难道仅仅是环境堆叠的无限叠加吗？' 添加了 '无限' 一词，虽能传达原文的怀疑口吻，但略微改变了原句的精确含义。原文 'stacked on top of each other' 强调简单的物理堆叠，而非强调 '无限'。

paragraphs.source: Anthropic has been an aggressive buyer in the RL environment market. Anthropic is often the first customer of dozens of new companies, providing them with exclusive contracts and in some cases tips on environment construction. We think they are working with more than a dozen RL environment companies as contractors. The company likely wants a broad ecosystem of vendors such that the product is commoditized, driving down costs on some types of environments.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Anthropic has been an aggressive buyer in the RL environment market. Anthropic is often the first customer of dozens of new companies, providing them with exclusive contracts and in some cases tips on environment construction. We think they are working with more than a dozen RL environment companies as contractors. The company likely wants a broad ecosystem of vendors such that the product is commoditized, driving down costs on some types of environments.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Anthropic has been an aggressive buyer in the RL environment market. Anthropic is often the first customer of dozens of new companies, providing them with exclusive contracts and in some cases tips on environment construction. We think they are working with more than a dozen RL environment companies as contractors. The company likely wants a broad ecosystem of vendors such that the product is commoditized, driving down costs on some types of environments.

pro.text: Anthropic一直是RL环境市场中激进的采购者。该公司通常是数十家新公司的首批客户，为其提供独家合同，有时甚至提供环境构建方面的建议。我们认为，他们与超过十几家RL环境公司签订了承包商协议。该公司很可能希望建立一个广泛的供应商生态系统，从而使产品商品化，以降低某些类型环境的成本。

paragraphs.source: A lively vendor ecosystem also attracts investors who can further subsidize costs. The tradeoff is overhead from managing many vendors at once, which is why we believe Anthropic is requiring vendors to adhere to specific sandbox frameworks in most domains and has built a vendor engagement platform.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: A lively vendor ecosystem also attracts investors who can further subsidize costs. The tradeoff is overhead from managing many vendors at once, which is why we believe Anthropic is requiring vendors to adhere to specific [sandbox frameworks in most domains](https://github.com/laude-institute/sandboxes) and has built a vendor engagement platform.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: A lively vendor ecosystem also attracts investors who can further subsidize costs. The tradeoff is overhead from managing many vendors at once, which is why we believe Anthropic is requiring vendors to adhere to specific sandbox frameworks in most domains and has built a vendor engagement platform.

pro.text: 一个活跃的供应商生态系统也能吸引投资者，从而进一步补贴成本。其代价是同时管理众多供应商带来的管理开销，因此我们认为Anthropic要求供应商在大多数领域遵循特定的沙箱框架，并已构建了一个供应商参与平台。

paragraphs.source: While it is correct that the company is focused on code, we are now seeing them start to ramp up on other domains. Computer use, for example, has been high on the priority list for some time now. Other areas, like biology, are also ramping, as we will show later. Coding is still central to their efforts, but is not the only domain they are interested in.

pro.text: 尽管该公司确实专注于代码领域，但我们目前看到他们也开始在其他领域加速布局。例如，计算机使用已在其优先事项清单上名列前茅一段时间了。其他领域，如生物学，也在加速推进，我们将在后文展示。编码仍是其工作的核心，但并非他们唯一感兴趣的领域。

paragraphs.source: We believe OpenAI buys from a smaller pool of vendors than Anthropic, though they outspend Anthropic and many other labs on net for data. To reduce reliance on third parties like Surge, Mercor, and Handshake, OpenAI is building an in-house human data team. xAI has taken a similar approach from the start, posting for AI tutors since the company launched and now ramping up that hiring.

pro.text: 我们认为OpenAI的供应商池比Anthropic更小，尽管他们在数据上的净支出超过了Anthropic和许多其他实验室。为了减少对Surge、Mercor和Handshake等第三方的依赖，OpenAI正在组建内部的人工数据团队。xAI从一开始就采取了类似的做法，自公司成立以来就一直在招聘AI导师，目前正在扩大此类招聘规模。

paragraphs.source: They outspend the labs because they have many parallel areas they are trying to scale. ChatGPT Agent sees heavy use of UI Gyms. The model which won IMO Gold, a version of GPT-5.1 Codex Max, benefited from large amounts of math and code data. The consumer version sees a mix from all the programs in addition to targeted post-training around behaviour.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: They outspend the labs because they have many parallel areas they are trying to scale. ChatGPT Agent sees heavy use of UI Gyms. The model which won IMO Gold, a version of GPT-5.1 Codex Max, benefited from large amounts of math and code data. The consumer version sees a mix from all the programs in addition to targeted post-training around behaviour.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: They outspend the labs because they have many parallel areas they are trying to scale. ChatGPT Agent sees heavy use of UI Gyms. The model which won IMO Gold, a version of GPT-5.1 Codex Max, benefited from large amounts of math and code data. The consumer version sees a mix from all the programs in addition to targeted post-training around behaviour.

pro.text: 他们的支出之所以超过其他实验室，是因为他们有许多并行领域试图扩展。ChatGPT智能体大量使用了UI训练场。赢得IMO金牌的模型——GPT-5.1 Codex Max的一个版本——受益于大量的数学和代码数据。其消费级版本则混合了所有项目的数据，此外还进行了针对行为的有针对性后训练。

paragraphs.source: The large volumes of data OpenAI procures has played a key part in their post-training efforts, which as mentioned, have driven the key capabilities forward in the last several generations. As their human data team scales, they will be able to skip paying the margins to many of the data vendors and aggregate more data volume for the same cost.

pro.text: OpenAI采购的大量数据在其后训练工作中发挥了关键作用，如前所述，这推动了其最近几代模型核心能力的进步。随着其人工数据团队的扩大，他们将能够省去支付给众多数据供应商的利润空间，从而以相同成本汇集更多数据量。

译文 '其庞大的产品经理团队对数亿用户如何实际与这些产品交互有着深刻的洞察，这为定义强大的模型性能应为何样提供了直接信号。' 后半句 '为定义...应为何样' 略显翻译腔，可以更精炼地道。
译文 '通往通用人工智能的道路，难道仅仅是环境堆叠的无限叠加吗？' 添加了 '无限' 一词，虽能传达原文的怀疑口吻，但略微改变了原句的精确含义。原文 'stacked on top of each other' 强调简单的物理堆叠，而非强调 '无限'。

paragraphs.source: Google DeepMind’s procurement is rather decentralized. Environment procurement specifically has been driven by researchers from different teams and programs. Specific environments they have been interested in centralized around coding and computer use, particularly ML related environments and tasks.

Specific environments they have been interested in centralized around coding and computer use, particularly ML related environments and tasks.

Specific environments they have been interested in centralized around coding and computer use, particularly ML related environments and tasks.

pro.text: Google DeepMind的采购模式相当分散。具体到环境采购，主要由来自不同团队和项目的研究人员驱动。他们关注的核心环境集中在编码和计算机使用领域，尤其是与机器学习相关的环境和任务。

paragraphs.source: Google spent a small amount of compute on post-training for Gemini 2.5 Pro, likely under 5% of pre-training compute at launch. While they have scaled it up for Gemini 3, we still think it is small relative to the other labs. Nevertheless, Google is uniquely positioned for this paradigm: they already own the underlying platforms (Sheets, Slides, Docs, Drive, Maps) and don’t need to build new ones. More importantly, their legions of PMs have deep visibility into how hundreds of millions of users actually interact with these products, providing a direct signal for what strong model performance should look like. It is then mostly a matter of time and politics until Google utilizes this user behavior to post-train Gemini on those applications.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Google spent a small amount of compute on post-training for Gemini 2.5 Pro, likely under 5% of pre-training compute at launch. While they have scaled it up for Gemini 3, we still think it is small relative to the other labs. Nevertheless, Google is uniquely positioned for this paradigm: they already own the underlying platforms (Sheets, Slides, Docs, Drive, Maps) and don’t need to build new ones. More importantly, their legions of PMs have deep visibility into how hundreds of millions of users actually interact with these products, providing a direct signal for what strong model performance should look like. It is then mostly a matter of time and politics until Google utilizes this user behavior to post-train Gemini on those applications. This is harder for Google than if it was just a technical barrier.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Google spent a small amount of compute on post-training for Gemini 2.5 Pro, likely under 5% of pre-training compute at launch. While they have scaled it up for Gemini 3, we still think it is small relative to the other labs. Nevertheless, Google is uniquely positioned for this paradigm: they already own the underlying platforms (Sheets, Slides, Docs, Drive, Maps) and don’t need to build new ones. More importantly, their legions of PMs have deep visibility into how hundreds of millions of users actually interact with these products, providing a direct signal for what strong model performance should look like. It is then mostly a matter of time and politics until Google utilizes this user behavior to post-train Gemini on those applications. This is harder for Google than if it was just a technical barrier.

pro.text: Google为Gemini 2.5 Pro投入的后训练算力很少，在发布时可能不到预训练算力的5%。尽管他们已为Gemini 3增加了投入，但我们认为相对于其他实验室而言，其规模仍然较小。然而，Google在这种新范式下拥有独特优势：他们已经拥有底层平台（Sheets、Slides、Docs、Drive、Maps），无需构建新平台。更重要的是，其庞大的产品经理团队对数亿用户如何实际与这些产品交互有着深刻的洞察，这为定义强大的模型性能应为何样提供了直接信号。因此，Google利用这些用户行为在这些应用上对Gemini进行后训练，主要只是时间和内部协调的问题。

paragraphs.source: Google has also been on the defensive, decreasing rate limits for scraping of their products like Gmail. This makes it harder for other to scrape the app and use the data for replication efforts (e.g., a mockup app to train with).

pro.text: Google也采取了防御性姿态，降低了对其产品（如Gmail）的爬取速率限制。这使得其他方更难爬取其应用数据并用于复制工作（例如，构建用于训练的模拟应用）。

sections.title: LLM-based Automation is not a given
sections.title_translation: 基于 LLM 的自动化并非水到渠成

paragraphs.source: There has been much speculation around the automation of jobs, particularly white collar work, due to AI. An interesting datapoint against this hypothesis can be found in OpenAI’s GDPval paper. OpenAI’s found that human experts were faster and finished tasks for a smaller cost than they would otherwise. With rising capability, humans were augmented, not automated.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: There has been much speculation around the automation of jobs, particularly white collar work, due to AI. An interesting datapoint against this hypothesis can be found in OpenAI’s GDPval paper. OpenAI’s found that human experts were faster and finished tasks for a smaller cost than they would otherwise. With rising capability, humans were augmented, not automated.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: There has been much speculation around the automation of jobs, particularly white collar work, due to AI. An interesting datapoint against this hypothesis can be found in OpenAI’s GDPval paper. OpenAI’s found that human experts were faster and finished tasks for a smaller cost than they would otherwise. With rising capability, humans were augmented, not automated.

pro.text: 关于AI将导致工作（尤其是白领工作）自动化的猜测一直不绝于耳。OpenAI的GDPval论文中有一个有趣的数据点，与这一假设相悖。OpenAI发现，人类专家完成任务的速度更快，且成本低于没有AI辅助的情况。随着AI能力的提升，人类得到的是增强，而非被自动化取代。

applied_terms: The contrast 'augmented, not automated' is rhetorically crucial; translate as '是增强/赋能，而非替代/自动化'.
Translate 'defensive posturing' accurately (防御性姿态) in a corporate strategy context.

understanding.role_in_article: Acts as an economic reality check, challenging the assumption that RL scaling automatically leads to white-collar job replacement.
understanding.relation_to_previous: Answers the previous section's skepticism about AGI by showing economic data that points to human augmentation rather than full automation.
understanding.relation_to_next: Mentions 'barriers to adoption' and 'defensive posturing', which leads directly into the final section on platform blocking.
key_points: OpenAI's GDPval paper suggests AI augments humans (making them faster/cheaper) rather than fully automating them.
Real-world complexities, such as in radiology, prevent straightforward automation.
Significant barriers to adoption exist, including defensive posturing from incumbent companies.
translation_notes: The contrast 'augmented, not automated' is rhetorically crucial; translate as '是增强/赋能，而非替代/自动化'.

paragraphs.source: As another example, before the AI hype, many predicted that radiology will be automated. This was due to capability increases in vision models. This has not borne out to be true, despite continued improvements.

inline_elements.text: This has not borne out to be true, despite continued improvements

paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: As another example, before the AI hype, many predicted that radiology will be automated. This was due to capability increases in vision models. [This has not borne out to be true, despite continued improvements](https://www.worksinprogress.news/p/why-ai-isnt-replacing-radiologists).

paragraphs.source: The idea that models will mostly augment workers may bear out for professional fields like consulting or software engineering. However, we think it is unlikely to be true for for shorter horizon, repetitive tasks, particularly call center jobs for example.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The idea that models will mostly augment workers may bear out for professional fields like consulting or software engineering. However, we think it is unlikely to be true for [for shorter horizon, repetitive tasks](https://x.com/karpathy/status/1971220449515516391), particularly call center jobs for example.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The idea that models will mostly augment workers may bear out for professional fields like consulting or software engineering. However, we think it is unlikely to be true for for shorter horizon, repetitive tasks, particularly call center jobs for example.

issues.description: 原文 'than they would otherwise' 的翻译 '且成本低于预期' 不够精确，削弱了原文的对比逻辑。
译文 'SemiAnalysis的数据点反映了其客户在速度和成本上获得的改进' 存在严重误译。原文是SemiAnalysis在引用OpenAI的图表时，加入了自己的数据点作为对比。
'shorter horizon' 被译为 '时间跨度较短'，虽然字面意思正确，但在RL/任务规划语境下，'horizon' 通常指任务的时间步长或规划范围。此处结合上下文（与呼叫中心工作并列），'shorter horizon' 更可能指任务决策链条短、无需长期规划。
译文 '撇开技术能力不谈，实际应用仍面临一些障碍。' 中的 '撇开...不谈' 略显口语化，且 '实际应用' 与 'adoption' 的对应可以更精准。
译文 '关于AI（尤其是针对白领工作）带来的职业自动化，一直存在诸多猜测。' 将 'due to AI' 处理为 '带来的' 略显平淡，且 '职业自动化' 不如 '工作自动化' 或 '岗位自动化' 常用。

sections.title: Sorry, your agent is not allowed
sections.title_translation: 抱歉，你的智能体被拒之门外

paragraphs.source: Agents can also be blocked from major sites, with this dynamic playing out between ChatGPT Agent and Amazon.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Agents can also be blocked from major sites, with this dynamic playing out between ChatGPT Agent and Amazon.

pro.text: 智能体也可能被各大网站屏蔽，这正是ChatGPT智能体与亚马逊之间正在上演的博弈。

Translate 'contingent on details' to reflect corporate negotiation realities (取决于/附带...条件).

issues.description: 译文“就正在上演这种动态”略显生硬，带有翻译腔。原文“this dynamic playing out”在商业分析语境下，更自然的表达是描述为“正在上演的博弈”或“正在发生的情况”。
译文“允许智能体在平台上购物”存在歧义，可能被理解为亚马逊主动允许。原文“agents shopping on the platform”描述的是智能体（代表用户）在平台上购物的行为本身，而亚马逊的“此举”（this move）指的是“屏蔽智能体”。逻辑链是：如果允许智能体购物（行为），会导致用户绕过广告（后果），所以亚马逊屏蔽智能体（举措）是合理的。
“后者正是当前上演的情况”与前一段的“这种动态”略有重复，且“上演的情况”搭配稍显生硬。可以更简洁地过渡。
“免费用户的货币化”表述准确，但在中文商业分析语境中，“变现”比“货币化”更常用、更自然。
“搭建”智能体略显口语化，在技术语境下，“部署”或“构建”更为常见。“RL即服务”的翻译正确，但首次出现时，可以考虑加注英文缩写，尽管术语表已定义，但在密集段落中首次出现时提示读者仍有益处。

paragraphs.source: For Amazon, this move makes sense: agents shopping on the platform will allow users to sidestep any ads on the platform. Amazon could restrict the ecosystem to their own model, Nova and Rufus, or leverage access in negotiations.

pro.text: 对亚马逊而言，此举合乎情理：因为如果允许智能体在平台上（代表用户）购物，用户就能绕过平台上的所有广告。亚马逊可以将生态系统限制在自家的模型（如Nova和Rufus）内，或者在谈判中以此作为筹码。

paragraphs.source: The latter is exactly what is playing out. OpenAI is in talks with Amazon to get access to the shopping platform, though this may be contingent on details relating to the use of Amazon’s cloud and chips. We anticipate companies like Google, Meta, Microsoft, and X will all restrict access to their ecosystems to the greatest extent possible, though this may be limited by antitrust concerns.

We anticipate companies like Google, Meta, Microsoft, and X will all restrict access to their ecosystems to the greatest extent possible, though this may be limited by antitrust concerns.

pro.text: 后者正是当前局势的焦点。OpenAI正在与亚马逊谈判，以获取其购物平台的访问权限，但这可能取决于与使用亚马逊云和芯片相关的细节条件。我们预计，谷歌、Meta、微软和X等公司也将在最大程度上限制对其生态系统的访问，尽管反垄断担忧可能对此有所制约。

paragraphs.source: Central to deals like the Amazon and OpenAI one is the monetization of free users. There is precedent to this: OpenAI announced “Instant Checkout,” integrated with Shopify and Etsy. We called this out as a potential path for agents in August.

inline_elements.text: OpenAI announced “Instant Checkout,” integrated with Shopify and Etsy

paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Central to deals like the Amazon and OpenAI one is the monetization of free users. There is precedent to this: [OpenAI announced “Instant Checkout,” integrated with Shopify and Etsy](https://x.com/OpenAI/status/1972708279043367238). We called this out as a potential path for agents in August.

pro.text: 像亚马逊与OpenAI这类交易的核心，在于免费用户的变现。这已有先例：OpenAI曾宣布与Shopify和Etsy集成的“即时结账”功能。我们在去年八月就曾指出，这可能是智能体发展的潜在路径。
