issues.description: 译文“就正在上演这种动态”略显生硬，带有翻译腔。原文“this dynamic playing out”在商业分析语境下，更自然的表达是描述为“正在上演的博弈”或“正在发生的情况”。
译文“允许智能体在平台上购物”存在歧义，可能被理解为亚马逊主动允许。原文“agents shopping on the platform”描述的是智能体（代表用户）在平台上购物的行为本身，而亚马逊的“此举”（this move）指的是“屏蔽智能体”。逻辑链是：如果允许智能体购物（行为），会导致用户绕过广告（后果），所以亚马逊屏蔽智能体（举措）是合理的。
“后者正是当前上演的情况”与前一段的“这种动态”略有重复，且“上演的情况”搭配稍显生硬。可以更简洁地过渡。
“免费用户的货币化”表述准确，但在中文商业分析语境中，“变现”比“货币化”更常用、更自然。
“搭建”智能体略显口语化，在技术语境下，“部署”或“构建”更为常见。“RL即服务”的翻译正确，但首次出现时，可以考虑加注英文缩写，尽管术语表已定义，但在密集段落中首次出现时提示读者仍有益处。

paragraphs.source: When it comes to enterprise, many are setting up their own agents. They often contract with other startups which conduct “RL as a service” for them, provided a specific task or workload.

pro.text: 在企业层面，许多公司正在部署自己的智能体。它们通常与其他初创公司签订合同，由后者为其提供针对特定任务或工作负载的“强化学习即服务”（RL as a Service）。

paragraphs.source: RL is highly effective at teaching models to use tools. Through using open-source tooling, some startups now offer tailored RL services to large enterprises. The space is comprised of smaller YC startups like RunRL and Osmosis, but also ones started by experienced researchers like Applied Compute and Adaptive ML.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: RL is highly effective at teaching models to use tools. Through using open-source tooling, some startups now offer tailored RL services to large enterprises. The space is comprised of smaller YC startups like RunRL and Osmosis, but also ones started by experienced researchers like Applied Compute and Adaptive ML.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: RL is highly effective at teaching models to use tools. Through using open-source tooling, some startups now offer tailored RL services to large enterprises. The space is comprised of smaller YC startups like RunRL and Osmosis, but also ones started by experienced researchers like Applied Compute and Adaptive ML.

pro.text: RL在教导模型使用工具方面极为有效。通过利用开源工具，一些初创公司现在为大型企业提供定制化的RL服务。这一领域既有像RunRL和Osmosis这样较小的YC初创公司，也有由经验丰富的研究者创立的公司，例如Applied Compute和Adaptive ML。

understanding.role_in_article: 待分析

issues.description: 术语‘dense models’译为‘稠密模型’在中文AI语境中虽可理解，但更常见、更精确的译法是‘密集模型’。‘稠密’在中文中更常用于描述物理性质（如稠密液体），而‘密集’在计算领域（如密集连接、密集计算）更普遍。
‘MCP’在文中首次出现，但未提供英文全称或解释。虽然目标读者是业内人士，但MCP并非像RL那样广为人知的核心术语，不加注可能造成理解障碍。

原文‘5x less compared to what it would cost on OpenAI's platform’译为‘比OpenAI平台低5倍的成本’存在歧义。中文‘低5倍’通常指成本是原来的1/5（即降低80%），但英文‘5x less’有时可能被误解为成本是原来的1/6（降低约83.3%）。虽然常见用法中‘5倍’多指乘数关系，但为绝对精确，应明确表达为成本是OpenAI的几分之一。
句子‘Anthropic 可能会通过其 API 开放这项服务，但同时也像 OpenAI 一样，正在积极招聘“前线部署工程师”…’结构稍显松散，将‘通过API开放’和‘招聘工程师’两个并列动作用‘但也’连接，转折关系不强。可以调整语序，使逻辑更紧凑，更符合中文分析性文本的节奏。
术语‘memory bound’译为‘受内存限制’准确。但‘总拥有成本’是‘Total Cost of Ownership (TCO)’的标准译法，此处使用正确。整句表述清晰。

原文‘All three have more success then OpenAI and Anthropic so far in this market.’ 译文‘迄今为止，这三家公司在该市场上都比 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 取得了更大的成功。’ 将‘then’处理为比较级‘than’是正确的（原文疑似笔误）。但‘更大的成功’表述稍显绝对，原文‘more success’是比较级，译文准确。需确保比较对象是OpenAI和Anthropic的RFT服务，而非这两家公司的整体。结合上下文，此意已隐含。

paragraphs.source: Often, Qwen models are used for this as they are easy to post-train and require little resources to run. Qwen has a variety of models, including small dense ones, which require less skill and set up.

pro.text: 通义千问模型常被用于此目的，因为它们易于进行后训练，且运行所需资源较少。通义千问拥有多种模型，包括小型密集模型，这些模型对技能和配置的要求较低。

paragraphs.source: After custom post-training, these models run on rented hardware. Currently, Baseten serves many these small, custom models. Typical targets include Salesforce and AWS Terminal and creating or closing Jira tickets. It is also possible to get models to be reliable at using MCPs, for example to extract data from SEC filings.

Typical targets include Salesforce and AWS Terminal and creating or closing Jira tickets. It is also possible to get models to be reliable at using MCPs, for example to extract data from SEC filings.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: After custom post-training, these models run on rented hardware. Currently, Baseten serves many these small, custom models. Typical targets include Salesforce and AWS Terminal and creating or closing Jira tickets. It is also possible to get models to be reliable at using MCPs, for example to extract data from SEC filings.

pro.text: 经过定制的后训练后，这些模型在租用的硬件上运行。目前，Baseten平台承载了许多这类小型定制模型。典型的目标任务包括处理Salesforce和AWS Terminal，以及创建或关闭Jira工单。此外，也可以让模型可靠地使用MCP（模型上下文协议），例如从SEC文件中提取数据。

paragraphs.source: These RL as a service startup are joined by the labs, with OpenAI recently spinning up a “Reinforcement Fine Tuning” (RFT) service. OpenAI RFT’s goal is to let any customer with sufficient data RL an OpenAI model so it is tuned to the customer’s tasks and domains.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: These RL as a service startup are joined by the labs, with OpenAI recently spinning up a “Reinforcement Fine Tuning” (RFT) service. OpenAI RFT’s goal is to let any customer with sufficient data RL an OpenAI model so it is tuned to the customer’s tasks and domains.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: These RL as a service startup are joined by the labs, with OpenAI recently spinning up a “Reinforcement Fine Tuning” (RFT) service. OpenAI RFT’s goal is to let any customer with sufficient data RL an OpenAI model so it is tuned to the customer’s tasks and domains.

pro.text: 这些提供“RL即服务”的初创公司正与各大实验室同台竞技，OpenAI最近就推出了“强化微调”服务。OpenAI RFT的目标是让任何拥有足够数据的客户都能对OpenAI模型进行RL训练，从而使其适应客户的具体任务和领域。

paragraphs.source: In practice, the service has fallen short. We believe it is unstable and too expensive for most customers. As such, we are seeing demand for these services mostly flow to young startups. These young, YC companies do not have strong margins. Indeed, they often lose money. However, they are able to serve users at 5x less compared to what it would cost on OpenAI’s platform, gaining market share.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: In practice, the service has fallen short. We believe it is unstable and too expensive for most customers. As such, we are seeing demand for these services mostly flow to young startups. These young, YC companies do not have strong margins. Indeed, they often lose money. However, they are able to serve users at 5x less compared to what it would cost on OpenAI’s platform, gaining market share.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: In practice, the service has fallen short. We believe it is unstable and too expensive for most customers. As such, we are seeing demand for these services mostly flow to young startups. These young, YC companies do not have strong margins. Indeed, they often lose money. However, they are able to serve users at 5x less compared to what it would cost on OpenAI’s platform, gaining market share.

pro.text: 然而在实践中，该服务并未达到预期。我们认为它不够稳定，且对大多数客户而言过于昂贵。因此，我们看到对这些服务的需求主要流向了年轻的初创公司。这些年轻的YC公司利润率不高，甚至经常亏损。但它们能够以仅为OpenAI平台成本1/5的价格为用户提供服务，从而获取市场份额。

understanding.role_in_article: 待分析

issues.description: 术语‘dense models’译为‘稠密模型’在中文AI语境中虽可理解，但更常见、更精确的译法是‘密集模型’。‘稠密’在中文中更常用于描述物理性质（如稠密液体），而‘密集’在计算领域（如密集连接、密集计算）更普遍。
‘MCP’在文中首次出现，但未提供英文全称或解释。虽然目标读者是业内人士，但MCP并非像RL那样广为人知的核心术语，不加注可能造成理解障碍。

原文‘5x less compared to what it would cost on OpenAI's platform’译为‘比OpenAI平台低5倍的成本’存在歧义。中文‘低5倍’通常指成本是原来的1/5（即降低80%），但英文‘5x less’有时可能被误解为成本是原来的1/6（降低约83.3%）。虽然常见用法中‘5倍’多指乘数关系，但为绝对精确，应明确表达为成本是OpenAI的几分之一。
句子‘Anthropic 可能会通过其 API 开放这项服务，但同时也像 OpenAI 一样，正在积极招聘“前线部署工程师”…’结构稍显松散，将‘通过API开放’和‘招聘工程师’两个并列动作用‘但也’连接，转折关系不强。可以调整语序，使逻辑更紧凑，更符合中文分析性文本的节奏。
术语‘memory bound’译为‘受内存限制’准确。但‘总拥有成本’是‘Total Cost of Ownership (TCO)’的标准译法，此处使用正确。整句表述清晰。

原文‘All three have more success then OpenAI and Anthropic so far in this market.’ 译文‘迄今为止，这三家公司在该市场上都比 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 取得了更大的成功。’ 将‘then’处理为比较级‘than’是正确的（原文疑似笔误）。但‘更大的成功’表述稍显绝对，原文‘more success’是比较级，译文准确。需确保比较对象是OpenAI和Anthropic的RFT服务，而非这两家公司的整体。结合上下文，此意已隐含。

paragraphs.source: In the longer term, this will change. OpenAI’s is targeting large enterprises who can spend millions, and in the aggregate, the labs will capture most of the revenue. For OpenAI, this will be done through the “Strategic Deployment” team, whose goal is to work directly with a customer to build custom models. OpenAI was early to bet on this service as an enterprise use case, and enterprise growth outpaced consumer in 2025 for the company.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: In the longer term, this will change. OpenAI’s is targeting large enterprises who can spend millions, and in the aggregate, the labs will capture most of the revenue. For OpenAI, this will be done through the “Strategic Deployment” team, whose goal is to work directly with a customer to build custom models. OpenAI was early to bet on this service as an enterprise use case, and **enterprise** growth outpaced consumer in 2025 for the company.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: In the longer term, this will change. OpenAI’s is targeting large enterprises who can spend millions, and in the aggregate, the labs will capture most of the revenue. For OpenAI, this will be done through the “Strategic Deployment” team, whose goal is to work directly with a customer to build custom models. OpenAI was early to bet on this service as an enterprise use case, and enterprise growth outpaced consumer in 2025 for the company.

pro.text: 从长远来看，这种情况将会改变。OpenAI的目标是那些能花费数百万美元的大型企业；总体而言，各大实验室将攫取大部分营收。对OpenAI而言，这将通过其“战略部署”团队来实现，该团队的目标是直接与客户合作构建定制模型。OpenAI很早就将此项服务作为企业用例进行押注，并且该公司在2025年的企业业务增长已超过消费者业务。

paragraphs.source: Anthropic is also entering the game. We believe Anthropic has its own RFT-like service that is more stable and more sample-efficient than OpenAI’s. Anthropic might expose it through the API, but is also actively hiring “Forward Deployed Engineers,” as OpenAI does, presumably serving the same function as the strategic deployment team at OpenAI.

Anthropic might expose it through the API, but is also actively hiring “Forward Deployed Engineers,” as OpenAI does, presumably serving the same function as the strategic deployment team at OpenAI.

pro.text: Anthropic 也正在加入这场竞争。我们认为，Anthropic 拥有其自研的、类似于 RFT 的服务，该服务比 OpenAI 的版本更稳定且样本效率更高。Anthropic 可能会通过其 API 提供这项服务，同时也效仿 OpenAI，正在积极招聘“前线部署工程师”，其职能很可能与后者的战略部署团队类似。

paragraphs.source: Anthropic is bringing on large volumes of Trainium, which is economically attractive for RL in part due to low $/HBM. HBM generally contributes a large part of the chip’s BOM, but Amazon sourced it directly, reducing costs. RL workloads are mostly inference, which is memory bound. This means having a low TCO chip like Trainium positions customers in a place to make strong margins off this service if they optimize the throughput a sufficient amount.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Anthropic is bringing on large volumes of Trainium, which is economically attractive for RL in part due to low $/HBM. HBM generally contributes a large part of the chip’s BOM, but Amazon sourced it directly, reducing costs. RL workloads are mostly inference, which is memory bound. This means having a low TCO chip like Trainium positions customers in a place to make strong margins off this service if they optimize the throughput a sufficient amount.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Anthropic is bringing on large volumes of Trainium, which is economically attractive for RL in part due to low $/HBM. HBM generally contributes a large part of the chip’s BOM, but Amazon sourced it directly, reducing costs. RL workloads are mostly inference, which is memory bound. This means having a low TCO chip like Trainium positions customers in a place to make strong margins off this service if they optimize the throughput a sufficient amount.

pro.text: Anthropic 正在大规模引入 Trainium 芯片。这对 RL 工作负载而言具有经济吸引力，部分原因在于其较低的 $/HBM（高带宽内存）成本。HBM 通常占芯片物料清单的很大一部分，但亚马逊直接采购，从而降低了成本。RL 工作负载主要是受内存限制的推理任务。这意味着，如果客户能充分优化吞吐量，那么使用像 Trainium 这样总拥有成本较低的芯片，将能从此项服务中获取可观利润。

pro.tokenized_text: [[[LINK_1|亚马逊的 AI 复兴：AWS 与 Anthropic 的多吉瓦级 Trainium 扩展]]] - Jeremie Eliahou Ontiveros, Dylan Patel 等 2 人 · 2025年9月3日

understanding.role_in_article: 待分析

issues.description: 术语‘dense models’译为‘稠密模型’在中文AI语境中虽可理解，但更常见、更精确的译法是‘密集模型’。‘稠密’在中文中更常用于描述物理性质（如稠密液体），而‘密集’在计算领域（如密集连接、密集计算）更普遍。
‘MCP’在文中首次出现，但未提供英文全称或解释。虽然目标读者是业内人士，但MCP并非像RL那样广为人知的核心术语，不加注可能造成理解障碍。

原文‘5x less compared to what it would cost on OpenAI's platform’译为‘比OpenAI平台低5倍的成本’存在歧义。中文‘低5倍’通常指成本是原来的1/5（即降低80%），但英文‘5x less’有时可能被误解为成本是原来的1/6（降低约83.3%）。虽然常见用法中‘5倍’多指乘数关系，但为绝对精确，应明确表达为成本是OpenAI的几分之一。
句子‘Anthropic 可能会通过其 API 开放这项服务，但同时也像 OpenAI 一样，正在积极招聘“前线部署工程师”…’结构稍显松散，将‘通过API开放’和‘招聘工程师’两个并列动作用‘但也’连接，转折关系不强。可以调整语序，使逻辑更紧凑，更符合中文分析性文本的节奏。
术语‘memory bound’译为‘受内存限制’准确。但‘总拥有成本’是‘Total Cost of Ownership (TCO)’的标准译法，此处使用正确。整句表述清晰。

原文‘All three have more success then OpenAI and Anthropic so far in this market.’ 译文‘迄今为止，这三家公司在该市场上都比 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 取得了更大的成功。’ 将‘then’处理为比较级‘than’是正确的（原文疑似笔误）。但‘更大的成功’表述稍显绝对，原文‘more success’是比较级，译文准确。需确保比较对象是OpenAI和Anthropic的RFT服务，而非这两家公司的整体。结合上下文，此意已隐含。

paragraphs.source: As noted, there is substantial upside in training custom models. One area in which we are particularly excited about is scientific discovery, within which custom models can make large amounts of progress.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: As noted, there is substantial upside in training custom models. One area in which we are particularly excited about is scientific discovery, within which custom models can make large amounts of progress.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: As noted, there is substantial upside in training custom models. One area in which we are particularly excited about is scientific discovery, within which custom models can make large amounts of progress.

pro.text: 如前所述，训练定制模型具有巨大的上升空间。我们特别看好的一个领域是科学发现，定制模型可以在该领域取得大量进展。

paragraphs.source: RL as a service is also offered by a number of other companies such as ThinkingMachines Tinker as well as Applied Compute and Adaptive ML. All three have more success then OpenAI and Anthropic so far in this market.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: RL as a service is also offered by a number of other companies such as ThinkingMachines Tinker as well as Applied Compute and Adaptive ML. All three have more success then OpenAI and Anthropic so far in this market.

pro.text: 提供“RL即服务”的公司还包括 ThinkingMachines Tinker、Applied Compute 以及 Adaptive ML。迄今为止，这三家公司在“RL即服务”这一细分市场上，取得的进展都超过了OpenAI和Anthropic（的相关服务）。

paragraphs.source: LLMs unlock a new frontier where models can search, plan, and propose experiments. With the right tools, agents will also be able to execute them. RL enables the harnessing of the feedback from those experiments into information the model can use to improve, enabling a loop of self-improvement given the right conditions.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: LLMs unlock a new frontier where models can search, plan, and propose experiments. With the right tools, agents will also be able to execute them. RL enables the harnessing of the feedback from those experiments into information the model can use to improve, enabling a loop of self-improvement given the right conditions.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: LLMs unlock a new frontier where models can search, plan, and propose experiments. With the right tools, agents will also be able to execute them. RL enables the harnessing of the feedback from those experiments into information the model can use to improve, enabling a loop of self-improvement given the right conditions.

pro.text: 大语言模型开启了一个新前沿：模型能够搜索、规划并提出实验方案。借助合适的工具，智能体还将能够执行这些实验。强化学习能够将这些实验产生的反馈转化为模型可用于改进的信息，从而在适当条件下形成一个自我提升的闭环。

understanding.role_in_article: 待分析

issues.description: 译文“RL 使得模型能够利用这些实验产生的反馈信息进行自我改进”将“harnessing... into information”的转化过程简化为了“利用...进行改进”，丢失了“将反馈转化为模型可用的信息”这一关键中间步骤的精确描述。
译文“基于物理实验奖励的闭环 RL 系统”中，“基于...奖励”的表述可能产生歧义，让人以为奖励信号“基于”物理实验这个事实，而非奖励信号“来源于”或“根植于”物理实验的结果。原文“grounded in”强调奖励信号的真实物理来源。
术语“cutoff date”译为“截止日期”在上下文中不准确。在LLM语境中，“cutoff date”特指模型训练数据所涵盖的时间范围截止点，即“知识截止日期”或“数据截止日期”。
译文“被加入中期训练阶段的数据的一个例子，是来自先前运行的环境轨迹。”采用了英文的“An example of data... is...”的抽象名词结构，导致中文主语过长、头重脚轻，不符合中文表达习惯。
译文“自行开展实验能够获得对输入变量和结果的完整认知，而仅依赖已发表论文进行训练则无法保证这一点——这些论文甚至在可比较的指标上也常常存在不一致。”将“something not guaranteed”处理为“无法保证这一点”，所指代的“这一点”稍显模糊，且后半句对论文问题的描述（“不一致”）与前半句“完整认知”的对比力度可以更强。

paragraphs.source: There are several companies leveraging this, and one such company is Periodic Labs. which aims to build an AI scientist trained through lab generated data.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: There are several companies leveraging this, and one such company is Periodic Labs. which aims to build an AI scientist trained through lab generated data.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: There are several companies leveraging this, and one such company is Periodic Labs. which aims to build an AI scientist trained through lab generated data.

pro.text: 目前已有数家公司正在利用这一趋势，其中一家便是 Periodic Labs。该公司的目标是利用实验室生成的数据，训练出一个 AI 科学家。

paragraphs.source: The goal is to create a closed-loop RL systemwith rewards grounded in physical experiments. Models use tools, including other smaller specialised models, to test out hypotheses and validate ideas. Then, these ideas are tested out in increasingly high fidelity simulators, which later inform physical experiments.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The goal is to create a closed-loop RL systemwith rewards grounded in physical experiments. Models use tools, including other smaller specialised models, to test out hypotheses and validate ideas. Then, these ideas are tested out in increasingly high fidelity simulators, which later inform physical experiments.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The goal is to create a closed-loop RL systemwith rewards grounded in physical experiments. Models use tools, including other smaller specialised models, to test out hypotheses and validate ideas. Then, these ideas are tested out in increasingly high fidelity simulators, which later inform physical experiments.

pro.text: 其目标是构建一个奖励信号根植于物理实验的闭环 RL 系统。模型会使用工具（包括其他更小型的专用模型）来测试假设并验证想法。随后，这些想法会在保真度越来越高的模拟器中进行测试，其结果最终将指导物理实验。

paragraphs.source: This way, subagents handle what they are good at and general LLMs can be used for orchestrating. Orchestration may also extend to physical tools, like characterizing materials, for example.

pro.text: 通过这种方式，子智能体负责其擅长的任务，而通用大语言模型则可用于编排协调。这种编排也可能延伸到物理工具，例如材料表征。

issues.description: 译文“RL 使得模型能够利用这些实验产生的反馈信息进行自我改进”将“harnessing... into information”的转化过程简化为了“利用...进行改进”，丢失了“将反馈转化为模型可用的信息”这一关键中间步骤的精确描述。
译文“基于物理实验奖励的闭环 RL 系统”中，“基于...奖励”的表述可能产生歧义，让人以为奖励信号“基于”物理实验这个事实，而非奖励信号“来源于”或“根植于”物理实验的结果。原文“grounded in”强调奖励信号的真实物理来源。
术语“cutoff date”译为“截止日期”在上下文中不准确。在LLM语境中，“cutoff date”特指模型训练数据所涵盖的时间范围截止点，即“知识截止日期”或“数据截止日期”。
译文“被加入中期训练阶段的数据的一个例子，是来自先前运行的环境轨迹。”采用了英文的“An example of data... is...”的抽象名词结构，导致中文主语过长、头重脚轻，不符合中文表达习惯。
译文“自行开展实验能够获得对输入变量和结果的完整认知，而仅依赖已发表论文进行训练则无法保证这一点——这些论文甚至在可比较的指标上也常常存在不一致。”将“something not guaranteed”处理为“无法保证这一点”，所指代的“这一点”稍显模糊，且后半句对论文问题的描述（“不一致”）与前半句“完整认知”的对比力度可以更强。

paragraphs.source: This process of testing ideas through increasingly high-fidelity methods to derisk experiments before running them in a lab maps roughly onto a graduate student’s typical workflow.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: This process of testing ideas through increasingly high-fidelity methods to derisk experiments before running them in a lab maps roughly onto a graduate student’s typical workflow.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: This process of testing ideas through increasingly high-fidelity methods to derisk experiments before running them in a lab maps roughly onto a graduate student’s typical workflow.

pro.text: 这种通过保真度逐级提升的方法来测试想法、从而在实验室实际运行前降低实验风险的过程，大致映射了研究生的典型工作流程。

paragraphs.source: Open-source models can be used as a starting point and mid-training can be done to extend capabilities. Mid-training is continued pre-training (next token prediction), which can be used for extending a model’s cutoff date, improving domain knowledge on specific topics, and or priming them for high compute RL. For example, when OpenAI models see a refreshed cutoff date, it is due to continued mid-training on top of the model.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Open-source models can be used as a starting point and mid-training can be done to extend capabilities. Mid-training is continued pre-training (next token prediction), which can be used for extending a model’s cutoff date, improving domain knowledge on specific topics, and or priming them for high compute RL. For example, when OpenAI models see a refreshed cutoff date, it is due to continued mid-training on top of the model.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Open-source models can be used as a starting point and mid-training can be done to extend capabilities. Mid-training is continued pre-training (next token prediction), which can be used for extending a model’s cutoff date, improving domain knowledge on specific topics, and or priming them for high compute RL. For example, when OpenAI models see a refreshed cutoff date, it is due to continued mid-training on top of the model.

pro.text: 开源模型可以作为起点，并通过中期训练来扩展能力。中期训练是持续的预训练（下一个词元预测），可用于扩展模型的知识截止日期、提升其在特定领域的专业知识，或为其进行高计算量的 RL 训练做准备。例如，当 OpenAI 模型的知识截止日期更新时，这通常是因为在模型基础上进行了持续的中期训练。

paragraphs.source: In highly specific scientific domains, mid-training will lead to higher quality models after post training. Meta, in their recent code specific model, found that the benefits of mid-training extended even after other stages (e.g., SFT) were applied. Meta used 1T tokens for mid-training for a recent model, but we expect OpenAI to be using somewhere between 5-10x more.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: In highly specific scientific domains, mid-training will lead to higher quality models after post training. Meta, in their recent code specific model, found that the benefits of mid-training extended even after other stages (e.g., SFT) were applied. Meta used 1T tokens for mid-training for a recent model, but we expect OpenAI to be using somewhere between 5-10x more.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: In highly specific scientific domains, mid-training will lead to higher quality models after post training. Meta, in their recent code specific model, found that the benefits of mid-training extended even after other stages (e.g., SFT) were applied. Meta used 1T tokens for mid-training for a recent model, but we expect OpenAI to be using somewhere between 5-10x more.

pro.text: 在高度专业的科学领域，中期训练将使得后续训练后的模型质量更高。Meta 在其最近的代码专用模型中发现，中期训练的益处甚至在应用了其他阶段（例如监督微调）后依然存在。Meta 在最近的一个模型中使用了 1T 词元进行中期训练，但我们预计 OpenAI 的使用量会高出 5 到 10 倍。

paragraphs.source: An example of data that it added into the mid-training stage is environment trajectories from previous runs. These are the collected rollouts that were generated when a previous version of the model was undergoing RL.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: An example of data that it added into the mid-training stage is environment trajectories from previous runs. These are the collected rollouts that were generated when a previous version of the model was undergoing RL.

pro.text: 中期训练阶段加入的数据，一个例子便是来自先前运行的环境轨迹。这些轨迹推演是在模型先前版本进行 RL 训练时收集生成的。

issues.description: 译文“RL 使得模型能够利用这些实验产生的反馈信息进行自我改进”将“harnessing... into information”的转化过程简化为了“利用...进行改进”，丢失了“将反馈转化为模型可用的信息”这一关键中间步骤的精确描述。
译文“基于物理实验奖励的闭环 RL 系统”中，“基于...奖励”的表述可能产生歧义，让人以为奖励信号“基于”物理实验这个事实，而非奖励信号“来源于”或“根植于”物理实验的结果。原文“grounded in”强调奖励信号的真实物理来源。
术语“cutoff date”译为“截止日期”在上下文中不准确。在LLM语境中，“cutoff date”特指模型训练数据所涵盖的时间范围截止点，即“知识截止日期”或“数据截止日期”。
译文“被加入中期训练阶段的数据的一个例子，是来自先前运行的环境轨迹。”采用了英文的“An example of data... is...”的抽象名词结构，导致中文主语过长、头重脚轻，不符合中文表达习惯。
译文“自行开展实验能够获得对输入变量和结果的完整认知，而仅依赖已发表论文进行训练则无法保证这一点——这些论文甚至在可比较的指标上也常常存在不一致。”将“something not guaranteed”处理为“无法保证这一点”，所指代的“这一点”稍显模糊，且后半句对论文问题的描述（“不一致”）与前半句“完整认知”的对比力度可以更强。

paragraphs.source: To supply data for RL and mid-training, Periodic is building a large physical lab to run experiments and produce experimentally verified reward signals. This is in line with other efforts, as DeepMind is also starting an automated materials science research lab in 2026.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: To supply data for RL and mid-training, Periodic is building a large physical lab to run experiments and produce experimentally verified reward signals. This is in line with other efforts, as DeepMind is also starting an automated materials science research lab in 2026.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: To supply data for RL and mid-training, Periodic is building a large physical lab to run experiments and produce experimentally verified reward signals. This is in line with other efforts, as DeepMind is also starting an automated materials science research lab in 2026.

pro.text: 为了给RL和中期训练提供数据，Periodic正在建设一个大型物理实验室，用于运行实验并生成经过实验验证的奖励信号。这一举措与其他努力方向一致，例如DeepMind也计划在2026年启动一个自动化材料科学研究实验室。

paragraphs.source: Running your own experiments yields complete knowledge of input variables and outcomes, something not guaranteed when training purely on published papers, which often disagree even with comparable metrics. Another domain which requires significant lab work is biology. It is also a domain in which the labs have had diverging approaches.

Another domain which requires significant lab work is biology. It is also a domain in which the labs have had diverging approaches.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Running your own experiments yields complete knowledge of input variables and outcomes, something not guaranteed when training purely on published papers, which often disagree even with comparable metrics. Another domain which requires significant lab work is biology. It is also a domain in which the labs have had diverging approaches.

pro.text: 自行开展实验能获得对输入变量和结果的完整认知，而仅依赖已发表论文进行训练则无法保证这种完整性——这些论文的数据即使在可比较的指标上也常常相互矛盾。另一个需要大量实验室工作的领域是生物学。该领域的实验室也采取了截然不同的技术路径。

sections.title: RL Meets the Wet Lab
sections.title_translation: 强化学习遇上湿实验室

paragraphs.source: There are two primary bottlenecks within biology: "how can promising drug candidates be identified faster" and "how can drug development be executed faster once candidates are found." OpenAI and Anthropic have both established pharma partnerships but are tackling different parts of this pipeline.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: There are two primary bottlenecks within biology: "how can promising drug candidates be identified faster" and "how can drug development be executed faster once candidates are found." OpenAI and Anthropic have both established pharma partnerships but are tackling different parts of this pipeline.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: There are two primary bottlenecks within biology: "how can promising drug candidates be identified faster" and "how can drug development be executed faster once candidates are found." OpenAI and Anthropic have both established pharma partnerships but are tackling different parts of this pipeline.

pro.text: 生物学领域存在两个主要瓶颈："如何更快地识别有前景的候选药物"以及"一旦找到候选药物，如何更快地执行药物开发"。OpenAI 和 Anthropic 都已建立了制药合作伙伴关系，但各自针对的是这一流程的不同环节。

understanding.role_in_article: 待分析

issues.description: 原文 'GPT-5 operating in a closed loop' 译为 'GPT-5 在一个闭环中运行'。虽然技术上正确，但结合上下文（提出修改、接收结果、自主迭代），'closed loop' 在此处更具体地指代一个无需人工干预的、从假设到实验再到分析的完整自动化研究循环。仅用 '闭环' 可能稍显宽泛，未能完全传达这种特定于科学实验的自动化流程内涵。
'Like periodic' 被译为 '与 Periodic 类似'。此处 'periodic' 首字母小写，在上下文中并非指代一个名为 'Periodic' 的特定公司（前文未提及），而更像是一个形容词或通用概念，可能指代 '周期性的' 或某种 '周期性/定期（进行实验）' 的模式。直接译为专有名词 'Periodic' 可能不准确。
译文 '这推动了对更高效算法和特定架构决策的需求，以使物理世界的强化学习变得可行。' 中，'变得可行' 对应 'tractable'。'Tractable' 在此语境下不仅指 '可行'，更强调 '易于处理'、'可控'、'可驾驭'，暗示物理 RL 因成本高昂而带来的独特挑战，需要专门设计来降低其复杂性和成本，使其变得 '可操作' 或 '可规模化'。
原文通过 'including that...' 引出具体含义，并用对比句强化观点。译文处理为 '这带来了有趣的启示，包括每美元所能获得的边际数据量远低于软件领域。一次生物实验...相比之下，一项编码任务...'。结构清晰，但 '启示' 后的冒号引导了一个长句，包含对比。可以考虑微调以增强节奏感和对比的鲜明度。

paragraphs.source: OpenAI is targeting early-stage discovery, building systems that conduct the research themselves. Recently, OpenAI showcased GPT-5 operating in a closed loop: proposing protocol modifications, receiving experimental results, and iterating autonomously with no human in the loop. As part of this effort, OpenAI also had to set up basic robotic systems to conduct the experiments. Fundamentally, this aims to increase the rate at which useful candidates are found.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: OpenAI is targeting early-stage discovery, building systems that conduct the research themselves. Recently, OpenAI showcased GPT-5 operating in a closed loop: proposing protocol modifications, receiving experimental results, and iterating autonomously with no human in the loop. As part of this effort, OpenAI also had to set up basic robotic systems to conduct the experiments. Fundamentally, this aims to increase the rate at which useful candidates are found.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: OpenAI is targeting early-stage discovery, building systems that conduct the research themselves. Recently, OpenAI showcased GPT-5 operating in a closed loop: proposing protocol modifications, receiving experimental results, and iterating autonomously with no human in the loop. As part of this effort, OpenAI also had to set up basic robotic systems to conduct the experiments. Fundamentally, this aims to increase the rate at which useful candidates are found.

pro.text: OpenAI 的目标是早期发现阶段，构建能够自行开展研究的系统。最近，OpenAI 展示了 GPT-5 在一个自动化实验闭环中运行：提出实验方案修改建议、接收实验结果，并在无需人工干预的情况下自主迭代。作为这项工作的一部分，OpenAI 还必须建立基础的机器人系统来执行实验。从根本上说，这旨在提高发现有用候选药物的速率。

paragraphs.source: Anthropic, on the other hand, is targeting the drug development and approval processes. Claude for Life Sciences is a platform with pre-built connectors linking directly to Benchling, 10x Genomics, PubMed, and other services scientists use. The goal is to be able to iterate faster on drug trials, for example. This is then neatly packaged in a solution ready to be shipped to enterprise companies, understandable essentially as a (functioning) Copilot for the Life Sciences. The core idea is to increase the speed at which documentation and approval happens.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Anthropic, on the other hand, is targeting the drug development and approval processes. Claude for Life Sciences is a platform with pre-built connectors linking directly to Benchling, 10x Genomics, PubMed, and other services scientists use. The goal is to be able to iterate faster on drug trials, for example. This is then neatly packaged in a solution ready to be shipped to enterprise companies, understandable essentially as a (functioning) Copilot for the Life Sciences. The core idea is to increase the speed at which documentation and approval happens.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Anthropic, on the other hand, is targeting the drug development and approval processes. Claude for Life Sciences is a platform with pre-built connectors linking directly to Benchling, 10x Genomics, PubMed, and other services scientists use. The goal is to be able to iterate faster on drug trials, for example. This is then neatly packaged in a solution ready to be shipped to enterprise companies, understandable essentially as a (functioning) Copilot for the Life Sciences. The core idea is to increase the speed at which documentation and approval happens.

pro.text: 另一方面，Anthropic 的目标是药物开发和审批流程。Claude for Life Sciences 是一个平台，内置了直接连接 Benchling、10x Genomics、PubMed 以及其他科学家常用服务的接口。其目标是，例如，能够更快地迭代药物试验。然后，这被打包成一个可交付给企业客户的解决方案，本质上可以理解为一个（功能性的）生命科学领域的 Copilot。核心理念是提高文档处理和审批的速度。

原文通过 'including that...' 引出具体含义，并用对比句强化观点。译文处理为 '这带来了有趣的启示，包括每美元所能获得的边际数据量远低于软件领域。一次生物实验...相比之下，一项编码任务...'。结构清晰，但 '启示' 后的冒号引导了一个长句，包含对比。可以考虑微调以增强节奏感和对比的鲜明度。

paragraphs.source: We think there is a likelihood both companies converge into tackling both domains, but the current split is revealing: OpenAI is chasing moonshot AI projects, while Anthropic is continuing with its more boring but practical enterprise plugs-ins and solutions. Long term potential will be revealed through each company’s speed of iteration and ability to take on more and more tasks in the pipeline.

paragraphs.source: Implied within this is the need for large amounts of biological data to train models. While companies like Mercor will be happy to take money from the labs, those companies do not have the ML or physical infrastructure to supply large amounts of biological data. This is where we see a role for companies like Medra, who aims to supply large amounts of biological data to the labs.

pro.text: 这其中隐含了对大量生物数据来训练模型的需求。虽然像 Mercor 这样的公司会乐于从实验室获得收入，但这些公司并不具备提供大量生物数据所需的机器学习或物理基础设施。这正是我们看到像 Medra 这样的公司发挥作用的地方，他们的目标是为实验室提供大量的生物数据。

paragraphs.source: Medra aims to set up a robotically automated scientific lab focused on biology. The company does not plan to build foundation models or design drugs. Instead, they aim to build the experimental infrastructure and generate the validated data that foundation model companies need to train on. Like periodic, Medra aims to build their own lab with hundreds of robots. We believe robotics will enable more consistent results and faster iteration, driven by the closed loop described above, but there will be a steep learning curve as set ups are optimised and systems made more robust. Lab automation is a decades old problem and improvement is likely downstream of restricting scope as opposed to sudden breakthroughs.

Instead, they aim to build the experimental infrastructure and generate the validated data that foundation model companies need to train on. Like periodic, Medra aims to build their own lab with hundreds of robots. We believe robotics will enable more consistent results and faster iteration, driven by the closed loop described above, but there will be a steep learning curve as set ups are optimised and systems made more robust. Lab automation is a decades old problem and improvement is likely downstream of restricting scope as opposed to sudden breakthroughs.

pro.text: Medra 的目标是建立一个专注于生物学的机器人自动化科学实验室。该公司不计划构建基础模型或设计药物。相反，他们旨在构建实验基础设施，并生成基础模型公司训练所需的已验证数据。与实现实验周期化类似，Medra 计划建立自己的实验室，配备数百台机器人。我们相信，在上述闭环的驱动下，机器人技术将带来更一致的结果和更快的迭代，但随着设备设置的优化和系统变得更加稳健，将面临陡峭的学习曲线。实验室自动化是一个存在数十年的难题，其改进更可能源于对范围的限制，而非突然的突破。

paragraphs.source: This further demonstrates how different post-training is to pre-training: if OpenAI choose a different set of experiments to optimise for versus Google DeepMind, then the resulting models and applications will be separate. The specialisation in these hyper specific domains cuts against the notion of model commodification and similarity.

pro.text: 这进一步说明了后训练与预训练有多么不同：如果 OpenAI 选择优化一组与 Google DeepMind 不同的实验，那么最终产生的模型和应用将是不同的。在这些高度特定领域的专业化，与模型商品化和同质化的概念背道而驰。

paragraphs.source: RL environments are spilling into the physical world. These environments are no longer just a docker container that can be arbitrarily spun up in software land. It is an experiment that needs to be run by a human or a robot, with a real cost to materials, electricity, equipment, and lab space. There are interesting implications to this, including that the marginal amount of data per dollar spent is drastically lower than in software. A single biological experiment can cost hundreds to thousands of dollars and take hours to complete, compared to a coding task that can be attempted 64 times and graded for a trivial cost. This drives up the need for more efficient algorithms and specific architectural decisions to make physical RL tractable.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: RL environments are *spilling* *into the physical world*. These environments are no longer just a docker container that can be arbitrarily spun up in software land. It is an experiment that needs to be run by a human or a robot, with a real cost to materials, electricity, equipment, and lab space. There are interesting implications to this, including that the marginal amount of data per dollar spent is drastically lower than in software. A single biological experiment can cost hundreds to thousands of dollars and take hours to complete, compared to a coding task that can be attempted 64 times and graded for a trivial cost. This drives up the need for more efficient algorithms and specific architectural decisions to make physical RL tractable.

pro.text: 强化学习环境正在渗入 物理世界。这些环境不再仅仅是可以在软件领域随意启动的 Docker 容器。它是一个需要由人或机器人运行的实验，涉及材料、电力、设备和实验室空间的真实成本。这带来了有趣的启示：每美元投入所能获得的边际数据量远低于软件领域。一次生物实验可能花费数百至数千美元，耗时数小时才能完成；相比之下，一项编码任务可以尝试64次，且评分成本微不足道。这推动了对更高效算法和特定架构决策的需求，以使物理世界的强化学习变得可驾驭。

sections.title: Why RL for Biology Can be Challenging
sections.title_translation: 为什么生物学领域的强化学习充满挑战

paragraphs.source: Scientific experiments can vary wildly in time required for completion. In biology, plenty of experiments take days to complete. These longer timelines require long rollouts, meaning rewards will be sparse. Sparse rewards provide less signal for the model to learn from.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Scientific experiments can vary wildly in time required for completion. In biology, plenty of experiments take days to complete. These longer timelines require long rollouts, meaning rewards will be sparse. Sparse rewards provide less signal for the model to learn from.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Scientific experiments can vary wildly in time required for completion. In biology, plenty of experiments take days to complete. These longer timelines require long rollouts, meaning rewards will be sparse. Sparse rewards provide less signal for the model to learn from.

pro.text: 科学实验所需的完成时间差异巨大。在生物学领域，大量实验需要数天才能完成。这些较长的周期要求进行长序列的策略展开，这意味着奖励将是稀疏的。稀疏奖励为模型提供的学习信号较少。

understanding.role_in_article: 待分析

issues.description: 术语“rollouts”的翻译“轨迹推演”在中文技术语境中虽可理解，但并非最通用或最直观的译法。在强化学习领域，描述策略执行以收集数据的过程，更常见的译法是“策略展开”或“轨迹采样”。
“straggler rollouts”被译为“掉队推演”，这个译法比较形象，但“straggler”在分布式计算/高性能计算语境下更常被译为“掉队者”或“慢任务”。直接组合成“掉队的策略展开”可能更清晰。
译文“迭代次数可提升约 2 倍”存在轻微歧义。原文“2x improvement on the amount of iterations”意指迭代数量变为原来的两倍（即提升一倍）。中文“提升约2倍”可能被理解为增加到原来的3倍（提升200%）。
“FutureHouse”是一个机构名，译文未提供中文译名或保留英文。根据全文对初创公司名保留英文的惯例，此处处理正确。但“Ether0”作为其项目/模型名，同样应保留英文。
译文结构基本忠实，但“前沿实验室（它们拥有...）与制药公司（它们拥有...）”的括号插入式说明稍显打断阅读流。可以考虑调整句式，使修饰关系更流畅。
“唾手可得的成果”是“low hanging fruit”的标准译法，准确。但结合后半句“非常迅速地产生巨大价值”，整个判断的语气很强。需确认这种强度是否与原文“extremely valuable rather quickly”匹配。
译文“推动进展大幅提升的许多能力，都依赖于 RL 的扩展。”是准确的直译，但主语“能力”稍显抽象。可以考虑将“capabilities”具体化或调整语序，使句子更符合中文表达习惯。

issues.description: 术语“rollouts”的翻译“轨迹推演”在中文技术语境中虽可理解，但并非最通用或最直观的译法。在强化学习领域，描述策略执行以收集数据的过程，更常见的译法是“策略展开”或“轨迹采样”。
“straggler rollouts”被译为“掉队推演”，这个译法比较形象，但“straggler”在分布式计算/高性能计算语境下更常被译为“掉队者”或“慢任务”。直接组合成“掉队的策略展开”可能更清晰。
译文“迭代次数可提升约 2 倍”存在轻微歧义。原文“2x improvement on the amount of iterations”意指迭代数量变为原来的两倍（即提升一倍）。中文“提升约2倍”可能被理解为增加到原来的3倍（提升200%）。
“FutureHouse”是一个机构名，译文未提供中文译名或保留英文。根据全文对初创公司名保留英文的惯例，此处处理正确。但“Ether0”作为其项目/模型名，同样应保留英文。

译文“推动进展大幅提升的许多能力，都依赖于 RL 的扩展。”是准确的直译，但主语“能力”稍显抽象。可以考虑将“capabilities”具体化或调整语序，使句子更符合中文表达习惯。

paragraphs.source: One way around this would be to reward the model’s steps, not just its result. This rewards the model’s process and thinking, as opposed to just the final action. While it can be difficult to correctly identify what a “correct” step looks like, it can be approximated through the use of rubrics. In fact, this is exactly how OpenAI grades problems on open ended research tasks in a recent eval, Frontier Science, which measures a model’s ability to perform scientific research tasks. In practice during experiments, tasks can be split into individually rewarded ones that shrink down the grading time horizon.

While it can be difficult to correctly identify what a “correct” step looks like, it can be approximated through the use of rubrics. In fact, this is exactly how OpenAI grades problems on open ended research tasks in a recent eval, Frontier Science, which measures a model’s ability to perform scientific research tasks. In practice during experiments, tasks can be split into individually rewarded ones that shrink down the grading time horizon.

While it can be difficult to correctly identify what a “correct” step looks like, it can be approximated through the use of rubrics. In fact, this is exactly how OpenAI grades problems on open ended research tasks in a recent eval, Frontier Science, which measures a model’s ability to perform scientific research tasks. In practice during experiments, tasks can be split into individually rewarded ones that shrink down the grading time horizon.

pro.text: 解决此问题的一种方法是奖励模型的步骤，而不仅仅是其结果。这奖励的是模型的过程和思考，而非最终动作。虽然正确识别一个“正确”的步骤是什么样子可能很困难，但可以通过使用评分标准来近似实现。事实上，OpenAI 在最近一项评估（Frontier Science，旨在衡量模型执行科学研究任务的能力）中，对开放式研究任务的问题进行评分时，采用的就是这种方法。在实际实验中，任务可以被拆分为多个单独奖励的子任务，从而缩短评分的时间跨度。

paragraphs.source: Long rollouts are also terrible for GPU utilization, which is why many of the labs have been utilizing methods like in-flight weight updates. Here, weights are exchanged and straggler rollouts continue with stale KV Caches. This allows for training to continue while straggler rollouts finish. The result can yield a 2x improvement on the amount of iterations for the same wall clock time.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Long rollouts are also terrible for GPU utilization, which is why many of the labs have been utilizing methods like in-flight weight updates. Here, weights are exchanged and straggler rollouts continue with stale KV Caches. This allows for training to continue while straggler rollouts finish. The result can yield a 2x improvement on the amount of iterations for the same wall clock time.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Long rollouts are also terrible for GPU utilization, which is why many of the labs have been utilizing methods like in-flight weight updates. Here, weights are exchanged and straggler rollouts continue with stale KV Caches. This allows for training to continue while straggler rollouts finish. The result can yield a 2x improvement on the amount of iterations for the same wall clock time.

pro.text: 长轨迹推演对 GPU 利用率也极为不利，这就是为什么许多实验室一直在采用飞行中权重更新等方法。在此过程中，权重被交换，而掉队的策略展开则继续使用过时的 KV 缓存。这使得训练可以继续进行，同时等待这些慢速推演任务完成。其结果是在相同的挂钟时间内，可完成的迭代次数可翻倍。

“唾手可得的成果”是“low hanging fruit”的标准译法，准确。但结合后半句“非常迅速地产生巨大价值”，整个判断的语气很强。需确认这种强度是否与原文“extremely valuable rather quickly”匹配。
译文“推动进展大幅提升的许多能力，都依赖于 RL 的扩展。”是准确的直译，但主语“能力”稍显抽象。可以考虑将“capabilities”具体化或调整语序，使句子更符合中文表达习惯。

paragraphs.source: Another bottleneck lies within the available data. Scientific literature often includes results that disagree with each other even on basic questions, making it difficult to construct reliable training sets. Biology is somewhat less challenging because existing open-source data is more common. AlphaFold was trained on data from the Protein Data Bank, which contained 170,000 samples. FutureHouse’s Ether0 used the Open Reaction Database. Additional efforts like EvE will continue to provide valuable platforms for model providers.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Another bottleneck lies within the available data. Scientific literature often includes results that disagree with each other even on basic questions, making it difficult to construct reliable training sets. Biology is somewhat less challenging because existing open-source data is more common. AlphaFold was trained on data from the Protein Data Bank, which contained 170,000 samples. FutureHouse’s Ether0 used the Open Reaction Database. Additional efforts like EvE will continue to provide valuable platforms for model providers.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Another bottleneck lies within the available data. Scientific literature often includes results that disagree with each other even on basic questions, making it difficult to construct reliable training sets. Biology is somewhat less challenging because existing open-source data is more common. AlphaFold was trained on data from the Protein Data Bank, which contained 170,000 samples. FutureHouse’s Ether0 used the Open Reaction Database. Additional efforts like EvE will continue to provide valuable platforms for model providers.

pro.text: 另一个瓶颈在于可用的数据。科学文献中常常包含即使在基本问题上也相互矛盾的结果，这使得构建可靠的训练集变得困难。生物学领域的挑战相对较小，因为现有的开源数据更为普遍。AlphaFold 便是基于蛋白质数据库中包含的 17 万个样本进行训练的。FutureHouse 的 Ether0 则使用了开放反应数据库。像 EvE 这样的额外努力，将继续为模型提供商提供宝贵的平台。

paragraphs.source: Though pharma also posses large swaths of closed source datasets. We expect to see more partnerships between frontier labs, which have the ML expertise pharma companies struggle to attract, and pharma companies, which have the biological data and clinical knowledge the labs lack.

We expect to see more partnerships between frontier labs, which have the ML expertise pharma companies struggle to attract, and pharma companies, which have the biological data and clinical knowledge the labs lack.

We expect to see more partnerships between frontier labs, which have the ML expertise pharma companies struggle to attract, and pharma companies, which have the biological data and clinical knowledge the labs lack.

pro.text: 尽管制药公司也拥有大量闭源数据集。我们预计，拥有制药公司难以企及的 ML 专业知识的前沿实验室，与拥有实验室所缺乏的生物数据及临床知识的制药公司之间，将建立更多的合作伙伴关系。

paragraphs.source: While there are obstacles, including some outlined above, there is so much low hanging fruit to capture that we expect efforts focused on high compute RL for science to be extremely valuable rather quickly.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: While there are obstacles, including some outlined above, there is so much low hanging fruit to capture that we expect efforts focused on high compute RL for science to be extremely valuable rather quickly.

pro.text: 尽管存在障碍（包括上文概述的一些），但仍有大量唾手可得的成果可以获取，因此我们预计，专注于科学领域高算力强化学习的努力将能非常迅速地产生巨大价值。

paragraphs.source: Many of the capabilities that have enabled the vast increase in progress have relied on scaling RL. While there is still plenty to go, there is one other dimension that is showing early promise. This can be done with current models, though at substantially higher costs. Below we dive into an additional frontier opening right in front of our eyes.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Many of the capabilities that have enabled the vast increase in progress have relied on scaling RL. While there is still plenty to go, there is one other dimension that is showing early promise. This can be done with current models, though at substantially higher costs. Below we dive into an additional frontier opening right in front of our eyes.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Many of the capabilities that have enabled the vast increase in progress have relied on scaling RL. While there is still plenty to go, there is one other dimension that is showing early promise. This can be done with current models, though at substantially higher costs. Below we dive into an additional frontier opening right in front of our eyes.

pro.text: 许多领域所取得的巨大进展，其背后的关键推动力正是 RL 的规模化扩展。虽然前路依然漫长，但另一个维度已展现出早期的希望。这可以用现有模型实现，尽管成本要高得多。接下来，我们将深入探讨一个正呈现在我们眼前的额外前沿领域。

sections.title: Multi agent architectures: GPT-5.2 Pro, Gemini Deep Think, Grok Heavy, Claude
sections.title_translation: 多智能体架构：GPT-5.2 Pro、Gemini Deep Think、Grok Heavy 与 Claude

paragraphs.source: An area ripe for scaling is combining different models to think together in service of a single problem. At a high level, this is how Grok 4 Heavy, Gemini Deep Think, and GTP5-Pro work.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: An area ripe for scaling is combining different models to think together in service of a single problem. At a high level, this is how Grok 4 Heavy, Gemini Deep Think, and GTP5-Pro work.

pro.text: 一个具备扩展潜力的领域，是将不同模型结合起来，共同思考以解决单一问题。从高层次看，这正是 Grok 4 Heavy、Gemini Deep Think 和 GTP5-Pro 的工作原理。

issues.description: 原文为 'GTP5-Pro'，译文为 'GPT-5 Pro'。此处存在拼写不一致，需核实原文是否为笔误。若原文确为 'GTP5-Pro'，译文应保持一致；若原文为 'GPT-5 Pro'，则译文正确。
原文 'an ensemble models' 存在语法错误（应为 'ensemble models' 或 'an ensemble model'）。译文处理为 '集成模型（负责生成新的、改进的解决方案）'，将复数名词单数化处理，并添加了功能描述。
译文将 'get a record on ARC-AGI' 译为 '在 ARC-AGI 上取得了创纪录的成绩'，意思准确。但整个段落的句子结构可以进一步优化，使其更符合中文科技报道的紧凑节奏。
术语 'SG Lang' 和 'SGLang' 在原文中混用（段落11原文为'SG Lang'，但上下文和常见项目名称为'SGLang'）。译文统一为 'SGLang'。此外，'plucked from' 译为 '提取' 准确，但 'isolated' 译为 '隔离' 在计算机语境下略显生硬。
原文 'on chess and go' 存在事实性错误。AlphaGo 专攻围棋（Go），而攻克国际象棋（chess）的是 AlphaZero（AlphaGo 的后续版本）。译文直接译为 '在象棋和围棋上'，延续了原文的错误。
译文将 'rather primitive' 译为 '相当初级'，语气匹配。但 'largely off of simple ideas that stitch together a more autonomous agent' 译为 '很大程度上就依赖于将简单理念组合成更自主智能体的思路'，略显冗长，削弱了原文 'off of' 那种直接、略带调侃的简洁感。

paragraphs.source: In practice, the details can vary. For example, aggregating answers from different agents can involve something basic like the most common answer, having the models confer between themselves to pick one, or having a separate model read all the answers and pick one. We expect many incoming products to leverage more sophisticated multi-agent architectures.

paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: In practice, the details can vary. For example, aggregating answers from different agents can involve something basic like the most common answer, having the models confer between themselves to pick one, or having a separate model read all the answers and pick one. We expect many incoming products to leverage more sophisticated multi-agent architectures.

pro.text: 在实践中，具体细节可能有所不同。例如，汇总不同智能体的答案可以采取一些基础方法，比如选择最常见的答案；也可以让模型之间相互商议以选定一个答案；或者让一个单独的模型阅读所有答案并做出选择。我们预计，许多即将推出的产品将采用更复杂的多智能体架构。

paragraphs.source: The first example that went mainstream of such a system was Google’s AlphaEvolve, which locked several different agents under different roles in one loop. The overall architecture in this instance had sampler models that assembled prompts from a database containing previously discovered solutions to a problem, an ensemble models to generate new and improved solutions, and an evaluation system to verify answers.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The first example that went mainstream of such a system was Google’s AlphaEvolve, which locked several different agents under different roles in one loop. The overall architecture in this instance had sampler models that assembled prompts from a database containing previously discovered solutions to a problem, an ensemble models to generate new and improved solutions, and an evaluation system to verify answers.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The first example that went mainstream of such a system was Google’s AlphaEvolve, which locked several different agents under different roles in one loop. The overall architecture in this instance had sampler models that assembled prompts from a database containing previously discovered solutions to a problem, an ensemble models to generate new and improved solutions, and an evaluation system to verify answers.

pro.text: 此类系统中第一个进入主流视野的案例是谷歌的 AlphaEvolve，它将多个扮演不同角色的智能体锁定在一个循环中。在这个具体架构中，包含采样模型（负责从包含先前已发现问题解决方案的数据库中组装提示）、集成模型（负责生成新的、改进的解决方案）以及验证系统（负责核实答案）。

paragraphs.source: These components were strung together in an evolutionary loop and their results were continuously checked by the verifiers. After a specific improvement over state-of-the-art solutions for a given problem were made, or when diminishing returns were reached given additional cycles, the loop ended.

After a specific improvement over state-of-the-art solutions for a given problem were made, or when diminishing returns were reached given additional cycles, the loop ended.

After a specific improvement over state-of-the-art solutions for a given problem were made, or when diminishing returns were reached given additional cycles, the loop ended.

pro.text: 这些组件被串联在一个进化循环中，其输出结果持续由验证器进行检查。当针对特定问题的解决方案相对于现有最优方案取得特定改进后，或者当额外循环带来的收益递减时，该循环即告终止。

paragraphs.source: Since then, many different architectures have popped up, some targeted at specific evals. As an example, researcher Jeremy Brennan leveraged a multi-agent architecture built on top of Grok 4 to get a record on ARC-AGI. The actual method is rather simple, involving Grok 4 generating instructions for each task. Then, each instruction is given to another agent that tests these instructions on the training examples. If a perfect solution emerges, these are locked in and applied to the held-out test grid. Otherwise, they enter an iterative refinement cycle.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Since then, many different architectures have popped up, some targeted at specific evals. As an example, researcher [Jeremy Brennan](https://jeremyberman.substack.com/p/how-i-got-the-highest-score-on-arc-agi-again) leveraged a multi-agent architecture built on top of Grok 4 to get a record on ARC-AGI. The actual method is rather simple, involving Grok 4 generating instructions for each task. Then, each instruction is given to another agent that tests these instructions on the training examples. If a perfect solution emerges, these are locked in and applied to the held-out test grid. Otherwise, they enter an iterative refinement cycle.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Since then, many different architectures have popped up, some targeted at specific evals. As an example, researcher Jeremy Brennan leveraged a multi-agent architecture built on top of Grok 4 to get a record on ARC-AGI. The actual method is rather simple, involving Grok 4 generating instructions for each task. Then, each instruction is given to another agent that tests these instructions on the training examples. If a perfect solution emerges, these are locked in and applied to the held-out test grid. Otherwise, they enter an iterative refinement cycle.

pro.text: 自那时起，各种架构层出不穷，其中一些专为特定评估任务设计。例如，研究员 Jeremy Brennan 利用基于 Grok 4 构建的多智能体架构，在 ARC-AGI 基准测试中创下纪录。其方法其实相当简单：先由 Grok 4 为每项任务生成指令，再由另一智能体在训练示例上测试这些指令。若出现完美解决方案，则锁定并应用于预留测试集；否则，便进入迭代优化循环。

issues.description: 原文为 'GTP5-Pro'，译文为 'GPT-5 Pro'。此处存在拼写不一致，需核实原文是否为笔误。若原文确为 'GTP5-Pro'，译文应保持一致；若原文为 'GPT-5 Pro'，则译文正确。
原文 'an ensemble models' 存在语法错误（应为 'ensemble models' 或 'an ensemble model'）。译文处理为 '集成模型（负责生成新的、改进的解决方案）'，将复数名词单数化处理，并添加了功能描述。
译文将 'get a record on ARC-AGI' 译为 '在 ARC-AGI 上取得了创纪录的成绩'，意思准确。但整个段落的句子结构可以进一步优化，使其更符合中文科技报道的紧凑节奏。
术语 'SG Lang' 和 'SGLang' 在原文中混用（段落11原文为'SG Lang'，但上下文和常见项目名称为'SGLang'）。译文统一为 'SGLang'。此外，'plucked from' 译为 '提取' 准确，但 'isolated' 译为 '隔离' 在计算机语境下略显生硬。
原文 'on chess and go' 存在事实性错误。AlphaGo 专攻围棋（Go），而攻克国际象棋（chess）的是 AlphaZero（AlphaGo 的后续版本）。译文直接译为 '在象棋和围棋上'，延续了原文的错误。
译文将 'rather primitive' 译为 '相当初级'，语气匹配。但 'largely off of simple ideas that stitch together a more autonomous agent' 译为 '很大程度上就依赖于将简单理念组合成更自主智能体的思路'，略显冗长，削弱了原文 'off of' 那种直接、略带调侃的简洁感。

paragraphs.source: Other architectures only use subagents. In one case, 4 distinct o4-mini subagents achieved 1.3x speedup on average on existing, production grade SG Lang Kernels. Specifically, existing CUDA kernels are plucked from SG Lang and isolated such that they can be evaluated on a standalone basis. Then it passes through a loop between four agents. One agents conducts testing to validate the kernel on a pass or fail basis, and the other conducts detailed profiling to identify performance deltas. The third agent plans targeted edits, while the fourth implements them.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Other architectures only use subagents. [In one case](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2509.07506), 4 distinct o4-mini subagents achieved 1.3x speedup on average on existing, production grade SG Lang Kernels. Specifically, existing CUDA kernels are plucked from SG Lang and isolated such that they can be evaluated on a standalone basis. Then it passes through a loop between four agents. One agents conducts testing to validate the kernel on a pass or fail basis, and the other conducts detailed profiling to identify performance deltas. The third agent plans targeted edits, while the fourth implements them.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Other architectures only use subagents. In one case, 4 distinct o4-mini subagents achieved 1.3x speedup on average on existing, production grade SG Lang Kernels. Specifically, existing CUDA kernels are plucked from SG Lang and isolated such that they can be evaluated on a standalone basis. Then it passes through a loop between four agents. One agents conducts testing to validate the kernel on a pass or fail basis, and the other conducts detailed profiling to identify performance deltas. The third agent plans targeted edits, while the fourth implements them.

pro.text: 另一些架构则仅使用子智能体。例如，4 个独立的 o4-mini 子智能体在现有的生产级 SGLang 内核上平均实现了 1.3 倍的加速。具体而言，现有的 CUDA 内核从 SGLang 中抽取出来进行独立评估。随后，它通过四个智能体之间的循环进行处理：第一个智能体进行测试，以通过或失败为基础验证内核；第二个智能体进行详细性能剖析，以识别性能差异；第三个智能体规划有针对性的编辑；第四个智能体则负责实施这些编辑。
pro.tokenized_text: 另一些架构则仅使用子智能体。[[[LINK_1|例如]]]，4 个独立的 o4-mini 子智能体在现有的生产级 SGLang 内核上平均实现了 1.3 倍的加速。具体而言，现有的 CUDA 内核从 SGLang 中抽取出来进行独立评估。随后，它通过四个智能体之间的循环进行处理：第一个智能体进行测试，以通过或失败为基础验证内核；第二个智能体进行详细性能剖析，以识别性能差异；第三个智能体规划有针对性的编辑；第四个智能体则负责实施这些编辑。

paragraphs.source: Note that this does not necessitate an increase in model capability, either. While inference costs are significantly higher, the value of the problems these agents can solve is higher than the cost of running them. This will especially be true in areas like science and coding.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Note that this does not necessitate an increase in model capability, either. While inference costs are significantly higher, the value of the problems these agents can solve is higher than the cost of running them. This will especially be true in areas like science and coding.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Note that this does not necessitate an increase in model capability, either. While inference costs are significantly higher, the value of the problems these agents can solve is higher than the cost of running them. This will especially be true in areas like science and coding.

pro.text: 值得注意的是，这并不必然要求模型能力本身的提升。尽管推理成本显著增加，但这些智能体所能解决问题的价值，超过了运行它们的成本。在科学和编程等领域，这一点尤其明显。

paragraphs.source: Some methods even report cost decreases on asks, like recursive language models. In this case, an orchestrator calls other models recursively throughout a task. These systems showed exceedingly high performance on long context evaluations, as context can be cleverly split between the subagents and the orchestrator.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Some methods even report cost decreases on asks, like [recursive language models](https://alexzhang13.github.io/blog/2025/rlm/). In this case, an orchestrator calls other models recursively throughout a task. These systems showed exceedingly high performance on long context evaluations, as context can be cleverly split between the subagents and the orchestrator.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Some methods even report cost decreases on asks, like recursive language models. In this case, an orchestrator calls other models recursively throughout a task. These systems showed exceedingly high performance on long context evaluations, as context can be cleverly split between the subagents and the orchestrator.

pro.text: 有些方法甚至报告了任务成本的降低，例如递归语言模型。在这种情况下，一个编排器在整个任务过程中递归地调用其他模型。这些系统在长上下文评估中表现出极高的性能，因为上下文可以巧妙地分配在子智能体和编排器之间。

paragraphs.source: OpenAI are actively exploring ideas like self-play and bringing principles from AlphaGo into LLMs, and we view them as the leaders in this particular space. AlphaGo was unique because it achieved superhuman performance on chess and go through playing games against itself, not against any other humans.

AlphaGo was unique because it achieved superhuman performance on chess and go through playing games against itself, not against any other humans.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: OpenAI are actively exploring ideas like self-play and bringing principles from AlphaGo into LLMs, and we view them as the leaders in this particular space. AlphaGo was unique because it achieved superhuman performance on chess and go through playing games against itself, not against any other humans.

pro.text: OpenAI 正在积极探索自我对弈等理念，并将 AlphaGo 的原理引入 LLM；我们认为他们是这一特定领域的领导者。AlphaGo（及其后续版本AlphaZero）的独特之处在于，它通过自我对弈而非与人类对弈，在围棋（以及后来的国际象棋等游戏）上实现了超人的性能。

paragraphs.source: Current LLM systems are rather primitive, and in principle are not that distinct from the model running in one for loop. This is powerful in practice: Claude Code is a billion dollar ARR product largely off of simple ideas that stitch together a more autonomous agent. However, it is important to look to what capabilities will look like when more sophisticated multi-agent cooperation come to production.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Current LLM systems are rather primitive, and in principle are not that distinct from the model running in one for loop. This is powerful in practice: Claude Code is a billion dollar ARR product largely off of simple ideas that stitch together a more autonomous agent. However, it is important to look to what capabilities will look like when more sophisticated multi-agent cooperation come to production.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Current LLM systems are rather primitive, and in principle are not that distinct from the model running in one for loop. This is powerful in practice: Claude Code is a billion dollar ARR product largely off of simple ideas that stitch together a more autonomous agent. However, it is important to look to what capabilities will look like when more sophisticated multi-agent cooperation come to production.

pro.text: 当前的LLM系统还相当初级，原则上与在单一循环中运行的模型并无本质区别。但这在实践中已足够强大：Claude Code这项年经常性收入达十亿美元的产品，其核心不过是用简单思路拼凑出一个更自主的智能体。然而，重要的是展望当更复杂的多智能体协作投入生产时，系统能力将呈现何种面貌。

paragraphs.source: Improved architectures for agent cooperation will similarly unlock the capability for LLMs to tackle larger and larger projects. In principle, this is not too dissimilar to humans being able to build larger projects in groups relative to individually.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Improved architectures for agent cooperation will similarly unlock the capability for LLMs to tackle larger and larger projects. In principle, this is not too dissimilar to humans being able to build larger projects in groups relative to individually.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Improved architectures for agent cooperation will similarly unlock the capability for LLMs to tackle larger and larger projects. In principle, this is not too dissimilar to humans being able to build larger projects in groups relative to individually.

pro.text: 改进的智能体协作架构同样将释放 LLM 处理越来越大型项目的能力。从原理上看，这与人类能够通过团队协作完成比个人单独工作更庞大的项目并无太大不同。
